description:
The Pond View Loft Apartment offers a private retreat on a quiet three-acre wooded property with a beautiful spring-fed three-quarter-acre stocked pond. Conveniently located just seven miles from Wrightsville Beach and ten miles from downtown Wilmington, the loft provides the perfect balance of seclusion and accessibility. Shopping, restaurants, and entertainment options, including a movie theater, are also nearby.

The space
This two-floor open-concept loft is designed for both comfort and convenience. The living area features a cozy lounge with a full-sized pull-out futon, a California king pillow-top bed, and a 50-inch UHD 4K LED Smart TV preloaded with YouTubeTV, HBO MAX, Netflix, Disney+Hulu, and Amazon Prime. The dining area is incorporated into this space, offering a comfortable spot for meals or remote work. The spacious bathroom features a large tub-style shower with plenty of room for dressing and makeup.

The efficiency kitchen comes equipped with a two-burner induction cooktop, toaster-style oven, microwave, and a full-size refrigerator with an ice maker, along with everything needed to prepare your favorite meals. Upstairs, the full-height loft bedroom includes a pillow-top king-size bed, a second 50-inch UHD 4K LED Smart TV, a desk, and an entertainment area complete with vinyl record, DVD, and CD players for the eclectic collection.

Guests enjoy complimentary high-speed internet, central heating and air conditioning with an air purifier, and a coffee bar stocked with coffee, tea, powdered creamer, sweeteners, and snacks. Laundry facilities are available on the shared porch behind the main building.

One of the most exciting upgrades is the private screened-in porch, perfect for enjoying fresh air, meals outdoors, or peaceful evenings overlooking the wooded property without worrying about pests.

Guest access
Guests are invited to enjoy the vibrant natural setting, complete with wooded walking trails, lush native landscaping with azaleas, gardenias, ferns, and Japanese maples, and the spring-fed pond stocked with fish. Local birds, turtles, frogs, and even the occasional barn owl make the property feel like a private wildlife preserve. Shared outdoor spaces also include a fire pit, though firewood is not guaranteed on-site.

Other things to note
For insurance reasons, guests must be at least 21 years old to book, and children under 12 cannot be accommodated. We are pet-friendly, though breed restrictions apply to exclude dangerous animals.

description:
Fresh and bright garage studio apartment, large beautiful deck and private entrance. Quiet neighborhood midtown Wilmington.
Perfect for longer term stays with all conveniences.

The space
Studio Aerie is a 450+ square foot open studio space above a garage and next door (but separate) to the main home. It is in a very quiet but convenient location, one of the prettiest neighborhoods in Wilmington—convenient to downtown (7 minute drive) and Wrightsville Beach (20 minute drive).
The queen bed features a comfortable premium mattress. All linens are provided for stays under 3 weeks.
The kitchenette includes a medium size refrigerator with small freezer, 4 burner ceramic cooktop, microwave, toaster oven, toaster, coffee maker, and full size sink. All kitchenware, utensils and dishes are provided. There is also an apartment size washer and dryer.
The small private bathroom has a fully tiled shower, sink with marble topped vanity, storage medicine cabinet, and toilet.
In the living area is a sofa that doubles as a futon, easy chair and smart television with Internet access. Stream movies through your streaming provider, or use the antenna to get local channels. A strong and fast WiFi internet access is provided.
The large outdoor deck overlooks a beautiful garden and is surrounded by a tree canopy.

*For bookings over 3 weeks in length, a biweekly cleaning service is provided to keep the unit in good condition. The price is built into your fee. This does not include washing your own linens and towels*

No pets (please don’t ask), age minimum for booking 25 years old, and I need a review history to approve your booking...thanks!

Guest access
Parking area is off the main driveway and close to the private boardwalk which takes you to the stairs, accessing a large tropical hardwood deck sitting shaded by a beautiful tree canopy.
Check in time is after 3pm and check out is 10am.

Other things to note
There is a staircase of 14 steps to get to the deck, so it is NOT handicap accessible.

- No pets, sorry - no exception.
- No EXTRA adult/s, infants or children as overnight visitors. Only persons (including infants) whose names are listed as guests in the registered booking are permitted.
- If additional guests stay at the property but are not listed in the booking an additional cleaning fee to cover the additional cleaning and laundry will be charged of not less than $40 per guest per night.
- No events or parties allowed
- No personal or business use of the residential address allowed
- No illegal activity or inappropriate anti-social behaviour.
- No commercial operations/photo shoots/commercial filming or adult filming on site.


A note about taxes and fees so there are no surprises:
Accommodation Taxes
The City of Wilmington and County of New Hanover require a 6% Accommodation Tax on all vacation rentals, which is collected from renters and paid to the City and County each month. A portion of this tax goes to beach nourishment projects to help keep County beaches beautiful and stable. These will be listed as Occupancy Taxes.

description:
Welcome to the Jamaica House!

We've had the pleasure of using Airbnb for years and love being hosts! Please read the entire listing to make sure our home is a good fit for you. We are happy to answer any questions.

The bungalow is conveniently located 5 minutes from downtown Wilmington and right across the street from the ILM International Airport.

The space
MORE ON YOUR HOME AWAY FROM HOME:

The bungalow is a cozy studio-style space located in the backyard behind the main house (the unit is approximately 360 square feet). We live in the main house. We like to give guests privacy, but you will likely see us during your stay.

The bungalow has a kitchenette with a mini-fridge and microwave, but please note there is NO oven/range. We offer complimentary coffee.

The bungalow has a 42” TV for your enjoyment. There is an antenna which gives you access to local channels as well as a movie collection. We do NOT offer any streaming services.

The bed is a comfortable queen sized mattress.

The bungalow has a 3/4 size bathroom with a stand up shower.

You'll have full access to the backyard. The yard is completely fenced in, however please note that we assume no liability if your pets escape or are injured for any reason.

There is a washer/dryer available for your use located in our car port.

Parking is available on site.

A LITTLE MORE ABOUT THE LOCATION:

We are an easy 5 minute drive from historic downtown Wilmington. Here you'll find shops including the Cotton Exchange, a plethora of restaurants and bars, and of course the scenic riverfront and the USS North Carolina.

Oh, and let's not forget THE BEACH:

Wrightsville Beach is your closest option about 20 minutes from the bungalow.

A 35 minute drive to the South side of town will lead you to Carolina Beach, Kure Beach, and the Fort Fisher State Recreation Area. Also located in this area is Carolina Beach State Park, the Ferry System, and the Fort Fisher Aquarium.

description:
Welcome to your perfect getaway! This serene and spacious 5-bedroom, 3-bath home is just under 4 miles from Wrightsville Beach. Close enough to sink your toes in the sand in minutes, yet tucked away in a peaceful setting you’ll love coming home to.
The private backyard is truly a highlight, featuring a saltwater pool surrounded by lush greenery, a grassy side yard for games or lounging, and a shaded “kid zone” with a treehouse with slide, swings, and hammock for ultimate relaxation.

The space
Quick update, we added a brand new comfy Havertys sectional to front living room and sconce lights for each bunk bed (great guest suggestions!) The modern kitchen is fully equipped with quartz counter-tops and sparkling stainless steel appliances any chef would love. Super comfortable beds with all linens and towels provided. With a living room and separate family room, everyone can relax comfortably, and enjoy different activities. High speed internet provided. However, you may not want to come inside with the incredible fenced backyard which includes a private in-ground pool in a tranquil setting. Relax in the hammock while the kids have a blast playing on the swings and tree-house, tire swing in the shaded play area. Practice free throws on the driveway basketball hoop. Enjoy steaks & fresh local seafood on the gas grill, and enjoy the outside dining.

Guest access
The whole house, pool, and private yard is for your use. Check out the garden shed which has some pool and yard toys available for guests.
There is a separate pool house used for storage in the back that is not available for guests.

Other things to note
Kayaking, and paddle boarding North Carolina’s coast is a great way to experience the natural wonders. You can spot dolphins, beautiful shorebirds, and maybe even a sea turtle. Bring your own or rent. Wilmington is the perfect destination for a golf getaway. Golfers can choose from five courses located in Wilmington as well as several courses located within a short and easy drive. If concerts are your thing, defiantly check out who's playing at the Green lake Amphitheater.

description:
Cozy, 1920s bungalow located near all of the hustle and bustle in downtown Wilmington! Features a newly renovated kitchen, 1 full bathroom with a new shower, a new half bath, a stackable laundry unit, a large off-street parking area, and a back deck with an electric grill. The home is conveniently located within a 10min walk to the center of downtown, a 3min walk to the Dram Tree Park on the river (with a public boat ramp), a 30min drive to the beach and a 15min drive to ILM airport.

The space
There are 3 bedrooms, 1 full bath, and 1 half bath. This is an older house, so bedrooms are on the smaller side. There's lots of extra space to spread out on our shaded back deck! This home is located a block away from the Cape Fear River and Memorial Bridge.

Guest access
Guests will be able to access the entire house and backyard.

Other things to note
The backyard is fully fenced in, so we do allow 1 pet for an additional $100 fee. Please crate your pet when not at the home, and also keep them off all furniture. Another $100 fee will be charged for any pet waste left in the back or side yards of the property. Please clean up after your pet!

Our home is located in Urban Mixed Use Zoning so there is a combination of business and homes in the area. You are in an urban area, so be aware that there will be noise and people walking around! There’s a brewery down the street, a small music venue, and a local hangout next door. If you’re looking for a super quiet stay, this may not be the spot for you. Traffic noise is busiest in the early morning and around 5pm. There are sound machines provided in each bedroom.

We have three, actively recording cameras: one overlooking the front door and front patio, one over looking the back deck and back yard, and one overlooking the parking area. All devices are on the exterior of the property. These devices are there for the protection of our property and to provide extra light. Do not touch or cover these expensive devices. If you rent the home, you agree to the cameras being on the property. If the motion light on the back deck is bothersome, please let us know! We can adjust it remotely.

If you need anything, have questions, or are not happy with something, please let us know! We sincerely want you to have the best experience.

description:
The second floor of a fully renovated historic 1800's duplex with all new beds, appliances, and furniture!

Come and relax in the second story of this wonderful 1800's Duplex. Located on one of Wilmington’s few remaining historic brick lined roads.

The space
Come and relax in the second story of this wonderful 1800's Duplex. Located on one of Wilmington’s few remaining historic brick lined roads. We completed an extensive renovation in summer of 2023 and are so excited to host guests here because it's a wonderful combination of historic charm, high ceilings, and modern amenities.

You have private access to the second floor of the duplex and the deck. If it’s vacant we are happy to show you the whole house! There is one off-street parking spot included which will accommodate only small and mid sized vehicles, but there is always ample street parking as well.

Guest access
You have private access to the second floor of the duplex. If it’s vacant we are happy to show you the whole house!

Other things to note
This is the second floor of a historic duplex.

We include coffee, a few lite options for breakfast and basic essentials available for you when you arrive!

The TV is a Roku smart TV so you can log into your favorite subscriptions!

There is a full flight of steps going up to this second floor duplex.
-About Our Cleaning Fee and Checkout instructions:
We take your vacation and our cleaning seriously—because it matters. Your cleaning fee covers far more than just a spotless space (which you’ll absolutely have). It also includes fresh linens, fully stocked coffee and snacks, bottled water, and the time it takes our team to prepare the home properly for every stay.
Most importantly: we never ask guests to clean before they leave. That’s exactly what the cleaning fee is for.
Our checkout instructions are intentionally simple:
• Let us know when you’re heading out (so we can get started for the next guest)
• Lock the door
That’s it. Relax, enjoy your stay, and leave the rest to us.

Late Checkout offer:
Checkout is 11am, but we can offer late checkout as availability allows. 12pm checkout is $20, and 1pm checkout is $30. Please contact us first and if we can accommodate your late checkout, we will be happy to.

description:
Parkview Cottage is nestled down an enchanting alleyway in the heart of Wilmington’s historic district. With a total living area of 980 sf, this cozy 2 story abode is packed full of character and charm. It is 5 minutes from downtown Wilmington with its quaint shopping, restaurants and vibrant nightlife, and 10 minutes from NC's beautiful beaches. It is located in a quiet and peaceful neighborhood, on a tree-lined street beside Mary Bridgers Park

The space
If you are looking for a quiet place in-between downtown Wilmington and Wrightsville Beach, Carolina Beach and the ILM airport you will find that Parkview Cottage is in an ideal location.

For One Tree Hill Fans - Parkview Cottage is down the street from \Peyton's House\"!

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire house. Easy check-in with a keyless entry pad on the front door.

Other things to note
There is a ring doorbell by the front door with camera. No other cameras or video equipment on the property."

description:

This home was newly redone (w/love) in a quaint neighborhood near downtown and a short drive to the beach. 3 brs w/ an open floor plan, great for gathering & entertaining! A private backyard with a grill & firepit. Large front porch with cozy seating. Spacious couch for relaxing; open area for kids upstairs.
1 mile from the heart of downtown and Riverwalk. Explore historic downtown Wilm shopping, coffee, restaurants, antiquing or pack up for a day at the beach!

The space
This home is great for gathering in the kitchen, relaxing on the couch, enjoying a neighborhood walk and conveniently exploring the beauty of Wilmington.

This home is our personal space and has been curated with care. We love to relax, entertain and visit with loved ones in the open space. We hope that you’ll make yourselves at home, enjoy it as it were your own and leave it in a similar condition as you found it. Thank you for sharing this space and experience with us!

There is a pack and play, toddler bed and a stroller in the house.

description:
The Boat House and Deck are reopened! Come enjoy our many outdoor spaces and updated kitchen countertops! New coastal cottage on a saltwater creek. Central location - less than 10 miles from Wrightsville Beach, Carolina Beach, Downtown Wilmington, and UNCW. Perfect for families, couples or a getaway with friends. Comfortably sleeps six.

Take out the complimentary paddle boards. Savor a rinse in the outdoor shower. Have a great time enjoying some down time!

The space
Our cute cottage serves as our guest house. You'll have full privacy with your own space, separate entrance, living space and kitchen. The cottage is connected to our home via a breezeway. We live onsite with our slow, kind and sweet 15-year-old dog. We're onsite so please let us know if you have any needs.

Downstairs, you'll find a fully equipped kitchen with a dinning table and a comfy living space. A large capasity washer and dryer is tucked under the stairs and helps manage the demands of beach life. Upstairs, you'll find the two bedrooms and the bathroom. The private master sleeps two in a queen bed. The loft room comfortably sleeps four with a queen bed and two twins. One additional small person could snuggle into the built-in bunk bed.

Outside you'll have access to the outdoor shower and foot-washing station. All of your beach toys can be rinsed and left to dry in this gated outdoor space. On the dock, there is a large propane grill that's connected to the boathouse. The boathouse includes a full-size futon and kitchette. Enjoy dinner on the dock with two outdoor tables and our boat bar.

We can't wait for you to enjoy the fun getaway that is our cute coastal cottage!

Guest access
Entire home. Shared backyard and dock space.

description:
Cozy, simple, comfortable, clean home base for you to explore Wilmington/Wrightsville Beach. Peaceful, open space furnished with a unique style that is perfect for your coastal retreat.

Close to Wrightsville Beach (1 mile to the bridge); UNCW main campus (under 3 miles); historic downtown Wilmington (less than 8 miles); plus many attractions and amenities - Airlie Gardens, Mayfaire and shopping, great restaurants and breweries, grocery stores, multiple yoga studios, bike shops, surf shops.

The space
Two-story, 1600 sq. ft. townhouse with full kitchen, two bedrooms, 2.5 baths, and private deck/courtyard. Great for a getaway with friends, a quiet beach visit, or getting to know the area. Also good for active, outdoor lifestyle folks with easy access to paddling and biking options. Open decor means enough space for your yoga practice, bikes, and boards.

Bedrooms have comfortable queen beds with ample pillows and nice linens. Kitchen has everything you will need to prepare and share regular meals. Living room includes large mounted TV with Roku.

Guest access
The whole townhouse is yours minus a small locked room upstairs that serves as owner's storage.

Other things to note
City of Wilmington short term rental registration #STL2020-0111. Fair and equal housing, LGBTQ friendly, veggie friendly, green cleaning products.

description:
Welcome to the Trails End Cottage! Your coastal oasis, surrounded by majestic oak trees and friendly local neighbors. You are a quick stroll to the beautiful Intracoastal waterway and community boat launch. Equidistant to Wrightsville + Carolina Beaches! Bring your boat, surfboards and paddle boards. Enjoy evenings under the tree canopy and cafe lights, cocktails by the firepit or grill a fresh fish dinner on the spacious back porch. This magical property is waiting for you!

The space
The space:
This charming, fully renovated ranch home will be your new favorite vacation spot! Unique in the fact that you have quick access to the water but set apart from the busy, highly trafficked beach areas. Not too far but enough to ensure a gorgeous sunset and quiet cocktail by the water (3 min walk) without the hectic beach traffic:)
The 3 bedroom ranch was recently upfitted in a cool, coastal modern style. You will want for nothing during your stay with lockbox entry, a spacious private backyard, large patio with propane grill and fire pit. Great sleep is a focal point for our guests. You can expect comfy beds and fresh linens ensuring excellent rest after a long day of exploring, surfing or beach combing. Guests are invited to bring their boats and personal watercraft with plenty of room for trailer parking at the house. The community ramp is just 2 blocks from the cottage.
If you prefer to have kayaks delivered for your stay we offer a 10% discount with our local rental company. Reserve for any length of time and enjoy the waterways, creeks and Masonboro island at your leisure.

Groups, couples and families will find the Trails End Cottage comfortable, fun and superbly clean!
Enjoy morning coffee in the serene backyard. The sound of the birds and a distant boat headed out to fish the inlet will be your only intrusion. At days end, enjoy evening cocktails and al fresco dinners under the café lights.
The house is equipped with Smart TVs and high speed AT&T internet. The kitchen is fully stocked and ready for cooking and grilling if you prefer not to indulge in some of our fantastic local restaurants. The large dining room is a wonderful spot to enjoy group meals or game nights. There are 3 bedrooms. The primary has a new king bed with hybrid, memory foam mattress, and a private en-suite with shower. There is a King ensuite bath bedroom, a queen bedroom, and a and bunk room with 1 double and 1 twin bed. Another full bathroom with bathtub is available. There is a desk and private workspace to take care of business while away. In warm months enjoy the outdoor shower. Beach chairs, towels, cooler and umbrella are provided. You may just decide to stay in your bathing suits the entire time :)

The cottage is located in a quiet neighborhood on Whiskey Creek and has quick access to the Intracoastal Waterway. The area is known for great kayaking, boating and where the popular \Dawson's Creek\" series was filmed. Approx 7 miles in either direction will get you to either Wrightsville or Carolina Beaches.
Longer term stays are possible.

We are available to answer any questions anytime but you will have complete privacy to feel at home away from home during your stay.

Guest access
This private home

Fort Fisher's Aquarium and historic battleground are due south. A ferry ride from there makes for a fun day trip to charming Southport where the movie “Safe Haven” was filmed. Grab lunch at Fishy Fishy a watch the shrimp boats unload their catch.

One mile from the cottage is the UNCW Marine Science Lab. The University of North Carolina at Wilmington is 6 miles away.

listing_name: Historic Studio in the heart of Downtown!
description:
It's the perfect cozy historic hideaway if you want to be in the heart of it all without the hassle! Enjoy the prime downtown location with fast WiFi, corner cafes, ghost tours, local breweries, fresh Farmers Market finds, a hip local art scene, and riverfront sunsets...if you want to experience the pulse of historic downtown Wilmington, this is it! This quirky and newly renovated studio has all the creature comforts you need for a happy, cozy stay. Park the car, no need to drive!

The space
Perfect for singles or couples, the studio is a charming 320 square feet. Located on the second floor, window overlooks a bright and sunny open-air atrium. The vibe is fun and eclectic here - feel free to kick your feet up and relax!

Sleep: The 2nd Street Studio has a real queen size Murphy bed that comfortably sleeps 2 people. It's comfy! The bathroom is spacious for 2. Linens and towels provided. Laundry is on-site and FREE for you.

Connect: Stay connected with the flat screen tv - you've got all the local channels, Amazon Prime video, free WiFi, or stream your own channels,

Eat: Complimentary Starbucks k-cups or hot tea options for your enjoyment! Fully equipped kitchenette, but you won't want to miss our local dining scene. :)

Park: It's right across the street and is $8/day. If you don’t mind walking 2 blocks, you will find free street parking on 4th Street. A big parking deck is on the corner, and several other decks are within walking distance. There are metered spots right out the front door and on every block (free after 6:30 pm and Sundays!). Plan to park your car and leave it - you won't need it unless you are headed to the beach! Since downtown is THE place to be, street parking can be tricky on holiday and festival weekends... contact us and we will help you.

Guest access
The place is all yours! Keycode access and gated secure entry. Self check-in with keycode.

Other things to note
The studio is located adjacent to a nightclub. Despite noise ordinances in place, they are occasionally louder than allowed (usually weekend evenings) and 80’s music may be heard. A noise canceling machine and earplugs are on-site and available for your comfort!

listing_name: The Clubhouse New Construction Downtown Wilmington
description:
Welcome to the Clubhouse! Built in 2017, it is nestled right in the middle of downtown Wilmington's Arts and Antique district at the corner of Castle Street and 5th Avenue. This home is all of the charm of historic downtown Wilmington with the luxury of newer construction!

The space
The Clubhouse is 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms with new Casper mattresses throughout. There is also a sofa bed in the living room. There is a modern shower in the en suite primary bathroom and a tub/ shower combo in the guest bathroom. The half bath is conveniently located on the main floor off of the living room. The professionally decorated home also boasts brand new Maytag stainless steel appliances throughout.

Please take notice: The Clubhouse is located in the Castle Street Arts and Antique District. It is downtown Wilmington close to lots of shops and restaurants. It is a culturally and ethnically diverse neighborhood. If you have any issues with that please chose another home to rent. We are extremely proud of our neighborhood and it’s eclectic fabric of neighbors.

Other things to note
We offer off street parking with a driveway. The curb to the driveway is steep so we recommend higher cars for it. There is generally plenty of street parking right in front of the house as well.

listing_name: Location Comfort and Class in Historic Downtown!
description:
This 1200 sqft apt is the front half of a house and has all the amenities of today and the charm of yesterday. A large covered porch is an essential feature in a southern home and you will find yourself compelled to sit there in the afternoon after a long day exploring Wilmington. It has an open living room/kitchen concept downstairs w 1/2 bath, and 2 bedrooms each with their own bathroom upstairs. Hardwood floors, concrete counter tops, stainless steel appliances, gas stove and hot water.

The space
Perfect location for any event at the Brooklyn Arts Center, Bakery 105, The Atrium, the Wilson Center or any wedding venue! Walking distance to restaurants, nightlife, and boutiques.

Great set up for Cast and Crew of Swamp Thing or any show being filmed in Wilmington. It has two queen bedrooms each with their own bath. And the location is perfect, right in the downtown area with easy access to EUE Screen Gems Studios on 23rd St.

The apartment is designed to make your stay very comfortable. Hardwood floors, stainless steel appliances, gas stove, gas point of use hot water means you never run out of hot water! It has a full sized washer and dryer, a standup shower in one bath and a tub in the other so the young ones can have a bath after a long day at the beach. Finish your day in premium cotton bed linens, made up and waiting for you! And, after a suggestion by a guest, we have installed black out curtains so you can sleep soundly in a darkened bedroom. And this is why Airbnb works, because of honest kind feedback! Thank you for reading this far, and we hope you choose our home for YOUR vacation!

Guest access
You can access the whole interior front space and the front porch. Please be sure to park on the street, The grass on either side of us belongs to the Church across the street. Thank you.

Other things to note
We have been hosting on Airbnb for 6 years and have been traveling members for about 10. In remodeling this unit, we have tried to put in all the amenities we like to see when we travel. If we have missed something, please let us know and we will be happy to oblige.

listing_name: MoonLight ~ River Front Retreat, Sunset Views!
description:
Beautifully decorated and updated 1 bedroom, 1 bath apartment located on the 5th floor with living room, kitchen and private balcony overlooking the Cape Fear River with front row views of the USS Battleship North Carolina, Eagle Island, and beautiful sunsets. Centered in downtown Wilmington, this apartment offers great walkability to fine and casual dining, local breweries, live theater, beautiful historic homes, Cape Fear Riverwalk, and many local attractions.

The space
Step into a thoughtfully designed retreat that blends modern comfort with the rich history and charm of Wilmington. Guests can immerse themselves in the city’s coastal heritage through a curated collection of local history books and vintage photographs displayed throughout the apartment, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere with a true sense of place.

Soft, soothing colors, luxurious bedding, and tasteful coastal décor make this space both relaxing and inviting. Custom cabinetry handcrafted by a local boat captain adds a unique touch of character, while the beautifully updated bathroom features a spacious walk-in tile shower designed with comfort in mind. Every detail of the apartment has been carefully selected to ensure guests enjoy a cozy, comfortable, and memorable stay.

The apartment includes a queen-sized bed, full-length mirror, hairdryer, iron and ironing board, and convenient hallway storage. The fully stocked kitchen is equipped with a refrigerator with ice maker, microwave, range oven, coffee maker, blender, cookware, dishes, glassware, and silverware—everything needed for preparing meals at home. Guests will also enjoy wall-mounted TVs in both the living room and bedroom, complimentary Wi-Fi, and the convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer. All linens and towels are provided, including beach towels for your coastal adventures.

The property is located within a secure residential building featuring elevator access and security cameras for added peace of mind.

Please note: this is a non-smoking property and is not suitable for pets, parties, events, or children under 12 years old.

Guest access
The whole place is yours!

Other things to note
Resort fee covers parking at no additioanl charge in a lot downtown.

All linens are included with your stay, and the bed will be made and ready for your arrival. A set of bath towels will be laid out for each guest. We also provide enough hand soap, dish soap, laundry & dishwasher pods, toilet paper, paper towels, & trash bags to get you started upon arrival. However, if you are staying longer than a couple of nights, please plan to supplement with your own supplies based on your personal needs.

listing_name: Chic Downtown Studio: A Hideaway Oasis
description:
Welcome to our chic downtown studio located in the heart of downtown Wilmington. Nestled in the heart of historic downtown district, our cozy studio offers a perfect blend of convenience and tranquility. This location is fully walkable to everything in downtown Wilmington, making it an ideal choice for couples, solo travelers, or if you're local, a great place for visiting family to stay.

The space
Our studio is a tucked-away oasis designed for comfort and relaxation. It's the ideal retreat for couples, solo travelers, or if you're local, a great place for visiting family to stay. Here, you'll find:

- A stylishly curated interior that exudes charm and comfort.
- A cozy atmosphere that welcomes you after a day of exploring.
- Thoughtful amenities to make your stay enjoyable, including a pre-packed beach bag with SPF and towels.
- A full kitchen ready for making meals after visiting the local farmers' market.

Location:

Our studio's prime location means you're just minutes away from some of Wilmington's top attractions:

Castle Street: A short walk away, Castle Street is home to vintage and vinyl stores, offering a taste of Wilmington's vibrant arts and culture scene.

North 4th Street: Stroll through historic North 4th Street to discover bars and bottle shops, perfect for winding down after a day of adventure.

Live Oak Pavilion: Experience the lively atmosphere of a concert venue at night and a sunlit park during the day, with the river as a picturesque backdrop.

Downtown: Immerse yourself in the vibrant downtown scene, from leisurely walks along the riverwalk to discovering an array of restaurants that cater to every palate.

Fun fact: Wilmington has been the backdrop for several beloved shows, including The Summer I Turned Pretty and One Tree Hill. Take a short walk or drive to explore filming locations and relive a few scenes from your favorite episodes!

Guest access
Building has a passcode access for your security and safety.

You will have access to a parking pass for the parking deck at 212 N 2nd St. - it's on 2nd St., in between Grace St. and Chestnut St. - We recommend placing your belongings in the unit first, grabbing the pass, then going to park because you'll need to scan both in and out to avoid the daily fee!

There is also free street parking along 4th St., it's just a little further of a walk.

Other things to note
One of the many great aspects of this apartment that we've loved over the years is it's location. Centrally located in downtown Wilmington, you'll have walking access to an array of local businesses.

With that being said, there is a bar next to our building and may cause some noise during your stay, particularly nights. For that reason, we don't recommend our space for children or anyone that would mind a little noise late at night!

listing_name: A Dream Come Blue: Coastal Poolside Oasis
description:
Situated within a residential neighborhood, this coastal home provides a poolside backyard oasis to satisfy all of your vacation needs. With a central location approximately 6-10 miles from all of Wilmington’s top tourist attractions such as Wrightsville/Carolina beach & the downtown Cape Fear Riverwalk, this space is perfect for anyone wanting to see all that ILM has to offer. This home features 3B/2.5 BA with access to a laundry room, kitchen & a dedicated workspace.

The space
After a day on the coastal Carolina beaches or spending time in Historic Downtown Wilmington, enjoy this 2,111 sq ft. poolside oasis that can hold up to 7 guests. The master bedroom sits on the first floor, next to the kitchen with an attached full bathroom. The kitchen has a 4 person table and provides all the cookware you need to have coffee, set up snacks for a day by the pool or cook a meal. Stepping out of the kitchen, onto the back porch is a table and umbrella overlooking the \Dream Come Blue\" pool that sits against an uncut forested area/gate. Relax in the backyard on a cozy poolside couch or a lounge chair. To escape the sun or rain

There is a full bathroom sitting in-between the two upstairs bedrooms. All rooms have TVs for your entertainment and closets/dressers to store your belongings. This spacious home is the perfect choice for a multi-family

Guest access
Guest have access to entire townhome

description:
This cute cottage is great for a family or group getaway. Spotlessly clean!! FULLY equipped kitchen including spices, condiments, oil and butter. Enjoy morning coffee in the screened in porch or relax on the shaded back patio in the afternoon. There is a Ring doorbell at the front door. PETS ARE NOT ALLOWED.

Centrally located and just 12 minutes from Wilmington's downtown, 5 minutes to restaurants and groceries and 15 minutes from Wrightsville Beach. Located in a middle class neighborhood.

The space
Two bedrooms, master with one queen bed and second bedroom with 2 twin beds allows families and groups (with a limit of 4 guests) to vacation together affordably (although I will deny bookings to groups who are coming here to party). I don’t allow guests under age 24 unless accompanied by a parent or other responsible older adult.

This home is cutely decorated (it is my home as well as my pet Beagle's home during the work week ) so I have many touches that will make you feel at home. The kitchen is fully equipped so if you choose, you can cook. Or just relax on the shaded patio or screened in porch. Keurig coffee maker. Generous linens and pillows. Three beach chairs and towels for you to take to the beach. Please read my reviews!!

Also, if you intend to bring a service animal, you MUST communicate with me. Your service animal cannot be left at home alone and must accompany you at all times.

My front door is equipped with a Ring doorbell that records. The Ring camera covers the front porch, front walkway, front yard and driveway. The camera is monitored.

Shopping, dining and multiple grocery stores are close buy. Ogden Park with a paved walking path, 9 tennis courts, child’s playground and skateboard park is a mile away.

Guest access
You have access to the entire house and fenced in private back yard.

Other things to note
True service animals are welcome. I will ask what service your service animal is trained to perform, as allowed by law. Emotional support animals are not allowed. Your service animal must be with you at all times. Topsail and Caswell Beaches allow dogs, so those are dog friendly options if you bring your service dog.

A service animal is an animal that has been individually trained to do work or perform tasks for people with disabilities. Service animals are working animals, not pets. The work or task a service animal has been trained to provide must be directly related to the person's disability. Dogs whose sole function is to provide comfort or emotional support do not qualify as service animals under the ADA.

Please, no dogs on furniture or beds.

I am not responsible for dogs that escape from the yard (although it is fully fenced with a 5 foot fence.)

Pick up after your dog.

Guests will be held responsible for any damage to house, furnishings, bedding or yard done by an animal and any furniture, carpet or bedspread cleaning cost caused by their animal.

listing_name: Entire Family Cottage 1/2 mile to Carolina Beach
description:
Seabreeze cottage 1 mile to Carolina Beach • Sleeps 8 • Screened porch + fire pit • 1 Gig WiFi • Washer/Dryer

Value beach cottage in Seabreeze, about 1 mile from Carolina Beach. Sleeps up to 8 with a full kitchen, fresh linens/towels, fast 1,000 Mbps WiFi, and easy self check-in. Enjoy the screened porch, patio set, gas grill, beach sand shower and fire pit for relaxed nights. Plenty of free parking. Minutes to the boardwalk, beach, stores, and restaurants. Late checkout possible.

The space
Be yourself — this is your vacation cottage.
Your cottage sits on about 2 acres of our 38-acre rural estate in Seabreeze—quiet, private, and full of fresh air and green space, yet about 1 mile to Carolina Beach public beach access and the Boardwalk.

Location (best of both worlds):
You’re close to the north end of the island where most shopping, groceries, and restaurants are located—about ½ mile to major stores and everyday essentials (grocery, pharmacy, coffee, dining, takeout, and more). Want our favorites? Ask us for our Local’s Guide with the best restaurants and things to do.

Your space:
You’ll have sole use of the entire cottage during your stay. The home includes 3 private bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, a full open kitchen, and a laundry room with washer/dryer. The primary bedroom and bath are on one end of the cottage for extra privacy.

Outdoor living (what guests love):
Plenty of room to relax outside with a fire pit, patio furniture, gas grill, and a screened-in porch.

Parking & access:
• Plenty of free parking (room for multiple vehicles and even a boat)
• Self check-in and 24-hour access so you can come and go anytime
• High-speed WiFi

Dogs welcome:
Well-behaved dogs are welcome (fee).

About the property:
We’re just before the bridge to Carolina Beach with easy access from US-421/Carolina Beach Rd. This is a tree-farm/rural setting, not a dense neighborhood—more space, more privacy, and still close to everything.

Water note:
We’re on well water (natural minerals). If you’re sensitive to well water, we recommend bringing bottled drinking water and ice.

Hosts & cleanliness:
We live on-site and own the cottages on the property, so help is close by while you still enjoy privacy. We’ve been Airbnb Superhosts since 2016 with 200+ five-star reviews, and the cottage is thoroughly cleaned and prepared before each arrival with fresh linens and towels.

House rules (simple):
No smoking/vaping inside. Smoking/vaping is fine outside on the patio, porch, or anywhere outdoors on the estate.

Guests have exclusive access to the entire cottage and a large private yard. Self check-in and 24-hour access via our private driveway just off US-421/Carolina Beach Road. Hosts are on-site and available by text or call with fast responses, but you’ll have full privacy during your stay.

Other things to note
NEIGHBORHOOD
Tucked away down our private 1,200-foot driveway, you’ll feel off the beaten path with acres of open green fields, towering live oaks draped with Spanish moss, and fresh coastal air drifting in from the Atlantic. Peaceful and private—yet still close to everything: about 1/2 mile to grocery stores, shops, and restaurants, and about 1 mile to the historic Carolina Beach Boardwalk and public beach access.

OTHER DETAILS TO NOTE
SETTING: This cottage is on a private 38-acre rural estate just off US-421 (Carolina Beach Road). Our home and a few other guest rentals are also on the property. You’ll have your own cottage and outdoor space, with hosts nearby if you need anything.

LOCATION: About 1 mile to public beach access and the Carolina Beach Boardwalk, and about 1/2 mile to shopping and dining near the north end of the island.

NATURE & VIBE: Open space, fresh air, live oaks with Spanish moss, and lots of birds—relaxing and away from the crowds, but still minutes to the beach.

WATER NOTE: We’re on well water (natural minerals). For guest comfort, we provide bottled drinking water and ice.

LOCAL FUN (SUPER CLOSE):
• Carolina Beach State Park: less than 1 mile (trails, nature, sunsets)
• Historic Carolina Beach Boardwalk + public beach access: about 1 mile
• Fort Fisher Historic Site (Civil War museum) + NC Aquarium at Fort Fisher + Southport Ferry: about 10 minutes
• Downtown Wilmington: about 20 minutes for the historic district, Riverwalk, breweries, and great restaurants

HOUSE EXPECTATIONS: Clean, comfortable, family-friendly cottage in a natural setting—not a luxury hotel—so if you love space, nature, and convenience, you’ll feel right at home.

description:

All of the Wilmington restaurants, shops and Riverwalk are a quick 10 - 15 minute walk, Beaches are short drive. The location is perfect for walking to the action of the river front or enjoying the tranquilty and peace on a quiet residential street.

The space

The suite is on the first floor which features private bedroom with queen bed, bathroom and study with dining table and reading chair - 350 square feet! There is private access to screened porch off of the suite which offers an additional 120 square feet. The kitchen is shared and available for use.

Holiday weekends require 3 nights booking.

description:
Spend the night in history! Tucked away in a quiet, historic, and culturally diverse neighborhood, the Rush-Steljes House (ca. 1853) is within walking (not in summer) distance to downtown, 1.5 miles to Riverfront Pavilion or Greenfield Lake amphitheater, and a short, 20 min drive to the beach. Guests stay in the ca. 1900 kitchen annex which was converted into a in-law suite in '95. The suite features a separate entrance, secluded porch, and attached bathroom.

The space
Decorated with antique and modern furniture, the guest suite features a private bathroom including the original cast-iron, soaking tub and stand-alone shower. The suite is also equipped with a mini fridge and stocked Keurig machine (regular coffee maker available upon request). There is a Smart TV for guests’ streaming services with local network tv available as well.

Guest access
Guests have a separate entrance to their suite from the courtyard.

Other things to note
This listing is not recommended for those who may be uncomfortable in a mixed-race or LGBT neighborhood.

listing_name: Private Historic Apartment, Short Walk to Downtown
description:
Welcome to the Lane House, built in 1922! Located in the hip and artsy Castle Street neighborhood, this 2-bed, 1-bath private suite in a historic duplex features vintage flair, modern amenities, and a menagerie of plants. Less than a block to restaurants, antique shops, and cafés. Just a short walk (10-15 min) to all downtown has to offer, and a 15 min drive to the beach. I take great pride in sharing Wilmington’s hidden gems! Perfect for weekend getaways, vacations, or extended business stays.

The space
Thoughtfully decorated with vintage and antique furnishings, the private upstairs apartment features two bedrooms (furnished with one queen-sized bed and one full-sized bed), full kitchen, bathroom with clawfoot tub, and laundry room. (Note that there is no living room/common area, but plenty of space to hang out with friends and family in the kitchen, main bedroom, and front porch. Please also note that the bathroom's clawfoot tub has a step to get in and out. It can be difficult for those with limited mobility.)

I love traveling with my dogs in tow, and I would love to host you and your fur family! There is a $50 fee per dog (or $75 per cat). These charges go towards handling the extra cleaning required. (Please note that if your dog(s) bark for prolonged periods, I will contact you to ask that you address the situation. If the situation is not resolved in a timely manner, I ask that guests pay an additional $20 fee. This is for the sake of my long-term downstairs tenant.)

Guest access
You will enter through the front door; the foyer is a shared space, with the downstairs (completely separate) apartment to the right and the private AirBnB suite up the stairs to the left. The entire upstairs apartment is private (2 bedrooms, 1 full bath, 1 kitchen, 1 laundry room).

Feel free to hang out on the front porch—it’s lovely for a morning coffee or evening beer! I do ask that guests speak quietly on the front porch after 11pm Sunday-Thursday and after midnight Friday-Saturday, as it is right in front of the downstairs bedroom.

Other things to note
I love traveling with my dogs in tow, and I would love to host you and your fur family! There is a $50 fee per dog (or $75 per cat). These charges go towards handling the extra cleaning required. (Please note that if your dog(s) bark for prolonged periods, I will contact you to ask that you address the situation. If the situation is not resolved in a timely manner, I ask that guests pay an additional $20 fee. This is for the sake of my long-term downstairs tenant.)

The door to the bedroom (w/ queen-sized bed) has a sliding barn door, which does not block sound. Please do not push against the door or allow children to play with it.

There is no living room, but plenty of space in the main bedroom and kitchen for groups to hang out.

description:
Bayshore’s brand new studio suite with kitchenette, updated bathroom, brand new sleep for two bed with luxury linens, new hardwood floors and TV with access to Netflix. Desirable Bayshore location with access to private boat launch and quiet neighborhood setting.Private entrance and parking space for 1 car.  Close to several beaches and downtown Wilmington. 1 mile walk to an Aldi, Chipotle, sushi, and smoothie/power bowl restaurant.

The space
Guests will enjoy the cozy studio to themselves. We are pet friendly so if you so choose to, bring your fur baby’s along. We do a have a $50 pet non-refundable fee.

Guest access
Guest have access to the left side of the drive way and stair case up to their private entrance. Please note that if you need additional parking for two cars please let us know and we may be able to accommodate that. Will need to have the capability to go up a flight of stairs.

Other things to note
Please note the studio has a common door(locked on both sides) that leads into home area. We can not hear guest but some have said they can hear noise from us such as dog barks and baby. If you need 100% silence this may not be an ideal stay for you as you may be able to hear noises.
******Also for those bringing pets know there is a leash law in place in Wilmington. Your dog duties are to be done off the studios and homes property. They are to done down by the street. They are not to be in the gated back yard unless given permission. You may,in properly enclosed bags, dispose of their waste in the black garbage can in the driveway. Animals are not allowed on furniture or beds. They must be potty trained, clean, and not aggressive. It is your responsibility to ensure the animals are free from fleas or other. It is your responsibility to ensure the animals do not damage the house including the finished hardwood floors. If the animals are a threat, bring safety concern, are not potty trained, or we determine you cannot adequately control the animal (this includes making excessive noise), we will ask you remove the animal from the premise.
********************we are on a well. Water is drinkable but does not taste like city water and may have an odor to some as most well water does.

Newly renovated with new appliances, furniture, beds, floors, and fixtures! Great classic victorian style paired with timeless modern decor and all of the amenities you need!

description:
Walk to everything!! Welcome to our delightful Airbnb property located at 612 Orange Street, Wilmington, NC! This duplex is a traditional Airbnb home where the owner lives when not rented. Nestled in the heart of the historic district, this cozy home offers the perfect blend of modern comfort and vintage charm, making it an ideal getaway for couples, families, or solo travelers.

Our pet-friendly oasis boasts a spacious living area adorned with tasteful décor and plush furnishings.

The space
The Property:
- Bedrooms: 3
- Bathrooms: 2

-This property follows the original spirit of Airbnb as an owner-occupied home. While the owner will not be present during your stay, you may notice personal items throughout the house, giving it a warm, lived-in feel. We kindly ask that you respect these belongings and enjoy the comfort and character of our home.

- Amenities: Fully equipped kitchen, high-speed WiFi, smart TV, washer/dryer, air conditioning, and a private front porch for relaxation.

- Decor: Thoughtfully decorated with coastal-themed decor, blending historical elements with contemporary conveniences.

Guest access
- Parking: Free street parking and additional parking in the back left of the house is available.

Other things to note
Location:
Our property is perfectly situated to explore the best of Wilmington. Here's a glimpse of what's nearby:

Attractions:
- Historic Downtown Wilmington (10-minute walk): Stroll along the scenic Riverwalk, explore charming boutiques, and enjoy the vibrant nightlife.

-Soda Pop District (10-min walk)

- Castle St. (7-minute walk) Enjoy restaurants like RX, Castle St Kitchen, Jesters, Oliver’s, and the locals favorite, Wilmington Wine Bar

- Battleship North Carolina (5-minute drive): Discover naval history aboard this WWII battleship, a must-visit for history buffs.

- Thalian Hall (10-minute walk): Experience a variety of live performances at this historic theater, from plays to concerts.

- Bellamy Mansion Museum (5-minute walk): Tour this stunning antebellum home and learn about its rich history.

Music Venues:
- Live Oak Bank Pavilion (5-minute drive): Enjoy top-tier concerts in a beautiful outdoor setting, featuring a range of genres from local to internationally renowned artists.

- Greenfield Lake Amphitheater (10-minute drive): Enjoy outdoor concerts in a picturesque setting, featuring a range of music from local bands to big-name artists.

- The Wilson Center at Cape Fear Community College (5-minute drive): A premier venue for concerts, Broadway shows, and other performing arts.

- WTF (Whiskey Tango Foxtrot) (10-minute walk): An intimate venue offering live music from local and touring musicians in a cozy setting with crafted cocktails.

- Bourbon Street (7-minute drive): A lively bar known for its great blues music and friendly atmosphere.

Restaurants:
- Fork N Cork (10-minute walk): Enjoy gourmet burgers and comfort food with a unique twist.

- The George on the Riverwalk (10-minute walk): Savor fresh seafood while overlooking the Cape Fear River.

- Copper Penny (15-minute walk): Relish in American pub fare with a wide selection of craft beers.

- Circa 1922 Restaurant and Bar (12-minute walk): Indulge in traditional dishes made with locally sourced ingredients.

Beaches:
- Wrightsville Beach (20-minute drive): Spend a day soaking up the sun, surfing, or swimming in the Atlantic Ocean.

- Carolina Beach (30- minute drive) Enjoy a laid back beach vibe while you immerse yourself in live music on a classic ocean boardwalk.

Convenience:
- Groceries: Harris Teeter and Food Lion are within a 10-minute drive for all your shopping needs.

- Parking: Free street parking and additional parking in the back left of the house is available.

Whether you're strolling through the historic streets of Wilmington or simply unwinding in the comfort of our home, your time here is sure to be unforgettable. Book your stay with us today and experience the true essence of Southern hospitality.

description:
Elevated row house in Historic Downtown Wilmington. One block off the Cape Fear River and Riverwalk and three blocks from Market Street. 2 bedrooms, 2.5 baths. Comfortably sleeps 4. Historic nautical decor. Fully stocked kitchen. King bed. Game room. Sunny, private back deck and two street-side balconies for coffee and cocktails. Walk to Live Oak Pavilion, wonderful restaurants, bars and shops, with a peaceful, quiet retreat upon return. High speed wifi. Free permitted street parking out front.

The space
This is a two story row house / townhome with 2 streetside balconies and a back patio space. Because the first floor is up a flight of stairs above the garage (game room) the space feels private and airy. The first floor has hardwood floors and contains the kitchen, main living and dining area as well as a walkout front balcony and rear, fenced patio and half bath. Upstairs you are greeted by a full bathroom with standing shower and natural light. The second floor has a secondary bedroom with two twin beds, ceiling fan and closet, and a primary bedroom with a King bed, full bathroom, tub, and walkout balcony.

High speed wifi

2 HD TVs with YouTube TV

Sleep your fuzzy little head in one of our 4 beds and become part of our family of transient creatives. The home is a part of the Cucalorus Film Festival Campus and is one of the hidden treasures in Wilmington.

description:
Centrally-located on the beautiful Cape Fear Coast, the PalmTreeHut is a charmingly-renovated Mid-Century garage that has preserved its authentic industrial/automotive charm, nestled among palm trees, with easy access to the Wilmington Riverfront, beaches, microbreweries, shops and natural beauty!

As an extension of the tropically-themed PalmTreeHouse upstairs apartment, you may book the PalmTreeHut simultaneously for parties of four, or go solo on your Wilmington excursion.

The space
PalmTreeHut is the name...and description...of this 600 square - foot garage conversion in the charming Chestnut Heights neighborhood of Wilmington, NC. With off-street parking, you will enjoy all the comforts of home as you explore the Cape Fear Coast, with fully furnished living room, kitchenette, bathroom, dining area, bar, and bedroom with king bed. The PalmTreeHut is the downstairs apartment of a two-unit building, with the tropically-themed PalmTreeHouse upstairs.

From the Tiki Porch, you can mingle with your hosts and other guests, as you plan each day's excursions.

High - speed internet is available, along with cable TV with many popular web apps.

Guest access
Guests will enjoy exclusive use of the PalmTreeHut apartment, one designated parking space, and the Tiki Porch.

Other things to note
As the restored garage of a Mid-Century carriage house, the PalmTreeHut retains the industrial/automotive character of its original purpose... with flairs of modern elegance that will make your stay comfortably unique! Though the renovation has incorporated soundproofing insulation, the PalmTreeHut remains a downstairs apartment in an historic structure that may allow some sound transfer between units.

description:
Walk everywhere from this prime downtown Wilmington location! This private and spacious first-floor suite is part of a charming historic home with original hardwood floors, high ceilings, a cozy living room, a stocked kitchen, and peaceful front and back porch seating. Self-check-in with keypad. Kid-friendly and great for couples or families looking for character, comfort, and the best walkable location in Wilmington.

The space
This first-floor apartment is part of a beautiful historic downtown Wilmington duplex. Like many homes in this neighborhood, it features classic architecture, original woodwork, high ceilings, and timeless historic character. Guests often comment on the charm and warmth of the space.
Inside, you’ll find a well-equipped kitchen, dining table for meals, comfortable beds, a spacious living area, and a charming clawfoot bathtub in the bathroom. The front and back porches on the first floor offer relaxing areas to sit, sip coffee, read, or simply enjoy the neighborhood atmosphere.
This is a real historic home — meaning it’s an authentic wooden structure with personality. You may occasionally hear normal daily sounds from the upstairs unit. Quiet hours are observed to ensure a peaceful stay for all guests, and any concerns are handled kindly and promptly.

Guest access
You’ll have full access to the entire first-floor unit, along with the front and back porches on that level — perfect for relaxing, enjoying your morning coffee, or winding down after a day exploring downtown.
Please do not use the driveway, as it is too narrow and not suitable for guest parking. There is ample free street parking nearby and it is almost always easy to find a space close to the house.

Other things to note
Self check-in is simple and convenient — you’ll receive a secure keypad code on your arrival day for easy access through your private entrance.
This is a lovingly preserved historic home with original features maintained whenever possible, including hardwood floors, vintage fixtures, and classic architectural details. If you appreciate historic charm and authentic craftsmanship, you’ll feel right at home here. If you prefer sleek, ultra-modern spaces, we also have contemporary listings available.
Complimentary water and snacks are provided for your arrival. The TV is a Roku smart TV — feel free to log into your own streaming services and enjoy your familiar favorites.
-About Our Cleaning Fee and Checkout instructions:
We take your vacation and our cleaning seriously—because it matters. Your cleaning fee covers far more than just a spotless space (which you’ll absolutely have). It also includes fresh linens, fully stocked coffee and snacks, bottled water, and the time it takes our team to prepare the home properly for every stay.
Most importantly: we never ask guests to clean before they leave. That’s exactly what the cleaning fee is for.
Our checkout instructions are intentionally simple:
• Let us know when you’re heading out (so we can get started for the next guest)
• Lock the door
That’s it. Relax, enjoy your stay, and leave the rest to us.

Checkout is at 11am, and late checkout can be arranged if available: 12pm for $20 or 1pm for $30. Just reach out — we’ll accommodate whenever possible.

Step inside and discover thoughtful design touches throughout from the shiplap ceilings and handcrafted rosewood countertops to the classic subway tile backsplash and oversized copper farmhouse sink.

Whether you're unwinding after a day at the beach or enjoying a cozy night in, this charming space blends comfort with character in all the right ways.

Candles, incense, or anything else that burns or has an open flame. Rose/flower petals (real), or Glitter

listing_name: Homestay with Private Bath Near Downtown
description:
This is a homestay. You will be sharing the home with the owner. The base price is for 1 or 2 people. When you enter your number of guests in your search or the reservation box, the correct price will be shown. It will include an extra per person charge for each guest over 2. A mile to the center of downtown. 20 minutes to the beach. 4 blocks from the Castle Street Arts & Antiques District.

The space
I give priority to guest requests that include information about the guests, including names of all guests and a bit about who you are and the purpose of your trip. A detailed profile helps me to know who I’ll be sharing my home with.
Your cozy room has a comfortable queen sized bed. The guest bathroom is in the hallway rather than ensuite. The roomy living room and dining room with coffee and tea service are always available to you. Please note that we do not have TV. We do have a high speed internet connection.
We are LGBTQ friendly and have open arms to any & everyone looking for a safe place to stay.

Guest access
You will have your own private bedroom and the guest bathroom in the hall. Other rooms in the home are shared with me. The comfortable front room and dining room (with its always-open help-yourself coffee bar) are available to you as is the relaxing front porch. You are welcome to borrow something to read from my bookcases.
My home is a relaxing retreat near the center of town. I am usually working in the sunroom in the back of the house or relaxing on the tree-filled back deck, ready to answer questions or chat if you wish but happy to leave you alone to enjoy your privacy if that’s what you need.
I look forward to meeting you.

During your stay
I work at home and am usually available to answer questions or share information on favorite places in town. I have given you a bit of information about me on my profile. Please tell me about yourself and your trip plans when you send a request to stay in my home. Be sure to include the names of all guests. Thank you.

Other things to note
Please note that you are booking a private bedroom and bath in my home. I try to give you as much privacy as you want, but if you are looking for an entire home or apartment to book entirely for yourself, you have landed on the wrong listing. I like to know who my guests are, so please tell me about yourselves and your trip plans.

Please note that I do NOT have television. I DO have a high speed WiFi connection and lots of books and magazines to read.

Parking is available in the small brick parking space directly in front of the house.

description:
Minutes to everything; Wrightsville Beach, Mayfair Walking Mall, Gary Shell Trail and UNCW! Reverse osmosis water system and monthly mosquito service because we care! House comes with everything including sheets, bath towels, beach towels, beach chairs and umbrellas! 2 adult bicycles, ping pong table, black stone grill, cornhole and tons of board games. Private pool just for you and your family. Gourmet kitchen and huge island to keep everyone together! Pool open Mid May -Oct 31.

The space
Our home has 4 bedrooms and 2 1/2 bathrooms primary suite bathroom is very small but freshly appointed and functional. One bed a king is located in our pool house with the 1/2 bath and outdoor shower.

Our home comes with bed linens, towels, and starter items to make your stay a bit more seamless. We have a full kitchen filled everything we think you need to prepare meals. At our home you’ll be able to be able to truly walk in and begin your vacation.

In our garage you will find our new washer and dryer as well as all the beach and pool essentials (chairs, umbrella and a few toys). Please only use items on the right side of the garage as items on the left side are supplies/maintenance items for our family not for guest use.

We truly hope you will love our home as much as we do! Please know that all items on the property are inventoried and guests will be fined for any damaged property or missing items. We know sometimes accidents happen so please alert us as immediately if anything comes up. Should you run out of a staple supply, let us know so we can replace it for the next guest. Please be aware that we live in the neighborhood and do have a ring camera at the front door and camera on the pool. Our pool guy comes in and out of the side gate a couple times a week. We will be sure to let you know when he is coming.

For the remainder of details refer and check the house manual that is provided through the Airbnb and a hard copy is printed at our home as well.

Guest access
We are in a lovely neighborhood called piney acres. We have a driveway that will fit at least 3 cars and parking on the street is permitted. 4 steps with handrail into house and to the pool area.

Other things to note
Our home is in a lovely small neighborhood. Lots of walkers and bikers, please drive slowly and please be respectful of neighbors!

The garage is not for parking cars, only for laundry and beach chairs, bikes and toys.

The pool house has 1/2 bath, and outdoor shower to keep the dripping bathing suits out of the home.

Please use the yard games, and pool toys. Pool safety is very important to us. Pool rules are posted, a safety ring always close by. PLEASE Glass items are not allowed around the pool we have plastic supplies for you to use.

We do have a ring camera at the front door and back of the house.

Kindly read our house manual as we are very diligent about having all of the information that you need in there as well as how to take care of our home. Following the house manual is the way we can ensure the best possible vacation through Airbnb.

Other things to note

listing_name: WOW! Pool+Pizza Oven near Beaches, UNCW & Downtown
description:
Welcome to our luxury home! Your private retreat sits on a lush half-acre of greenery and offers an array of amenities that are perfect for outdoor dining, relaxation & fun.

Step outside and take a dip in the sparkling in-ground pool or relax in the spacious cabana. Enjoy the hot tub and let the bubbles melt away your stress. You can rinse off in the outdoor shower and savor a meal from your very own outdoor kitchen, complete with a genuine wood-fired Italian brick pizza oven.

The space
But that's just the beginning! Our luxury home offers so much more, with stylish interior design, open living spaces, and a prime location in Sea Pines.

The open floor plan of our home is perfect for entertaining and relaxing, with plenty of space for everyone to spread out and enjoy. The living room features comfortable seating, a large flat-screen TV, and a beautiful fireplace. The dining area is adjacent to the living room and features a large table that comfortably seats eight.

The oversized kitchen is a chef's dream. Whether you're cooking a gourmet meal or just whipping up a quick snack, you'll love the convenience and style of this modern kitchen. Plus seating for eight.

The bedrooms in our home are comfortable and stylish, with plenty of space for everyone. The master bedroom features a king-sized bed and a private en-suite bathroom with a walk-in shower for two and a deep soaking tub. There are four bedrooms in total. The other bedrooms each feature queen-sized beds and plenty of closet space. One has a bonus room with a Queen bed, a twin-sized bed and a twin sized daybed, perfect for an extra guest. The attached in-law suite features another queen bedroom, another bathroom, an extra living room with another day bed. It is a super cozy and the perfect quiet reading spot.

You'll also find a billiard room, with extra seating. Why not enjoy a quick game with family or friends.

And don't forget the outdoor pool oasis. After a day at the beach you can keep the fun going! Just step outside and take a dip in the sparkling in-ground pool, or relax in the spacious cabana. Maybe you'll need some time in the Stand alone hot tub to relax and unwind. Then rinse off in the outdoor shower and begin a unique and delicious pizza night with an authentic Italian brick wood fired pizza oven.

But it's not just the home itself that's impressive. Sea Pines is a sought-after location, and for good reason. You'll be just a short drive from some of the most beautiful beaches in the world, with miles of pristine coastline to explore. Spend your days surfing, swimming, fishing or simply walking along the sand and soaking up the sun. If you're feeling adventurous, you can try your hand at paddleboarding or kayaking. Then there is the downtown Riverwalk. Make sure to find time to explore with charming local shops, tons of dining options and activities. Stay for a spectacular sunset overlooking the river and the Battleship North Carolina.

For those who love nature, Sea Pines is a paradise. The Wilmington area is home to a variety of wildlife, including dolphins, sea turtles, and an array of bird species. You can take a guided nature tour at the arboretum to learn more about the local flora and fauna, or simply spend time exploring the many nature trails that wind through the area.

At our luxury home in Sea Pines, you'll have everything you need to enjoy the perfect vacation. From the beautiful and spacious interior to the outdoor oasis and prime location, this home is the ultimate in luxury and comfort. Book your stay today and experience the best of Wilmington!

Guest access
Entire home.

Other things to note
The pool is maintained professionally on a weekly basis. Our goal is for it to be available for guests. We do not anticipate any issues. However, be aware there is no guarantee that pool will be available due to nature of maintaining a pool.
Pool is not heated. But new Standalone HOT TUB is.... HOT! Thank you for understanding.

listing_name: Cozy Cabin on the Creek- bring your kayak!
description:
Welcome!

We are the owners/ builders of this house constructed in 2016 and live in the main house beside it. It has its own entrance and sits above the garage for great views of the creek, Intracoastal Waterway beyond, and sunrises each morning.

The Cozy Cabin is close to Wrightsville Beach, downtown Wilmington, Airlie Gardens, nightlife, the airport, and parks. It is bright, spacious, and full of custom touches and amenities. For kayakers, a dock and access to the water are within steps.

The space
The space is all yours. You have access to the entire space above the garage. It is private and has its own entrance. It is about 800 square feet with bedroom, bath with shower, kitchen, dining, and living room. It has a washer and dryer and an outdoor shower under the stairway. There is a private outdoor deck overlooking Hewlett's Creek and access to grilling downstairs.

Guest access
We use self check-in and will give you information about that as your visit gets closer. If you need to store luggage before your check in, we can accommodate that.

Other perks:
* Within 15 minutes of historic downtown Wilminton to the west, Wrightsville Beach to the east, and Carolina Beach to the south. Myrtle Beach is 60 miles away and Charleston, S.C. about 3 1/2 hours.

* Access to the water is steps away. Our creek leads to barrier islands and beaches by kayak or paddle board. Bring your own or we can help you with a kayak rental, an eco-tour guide, or beach paddle guide (weather permitting).

* We have a yoga studio that can be used for your own practice or there may be a scheduled practice there. If you need an instructor let us know!

* Need help with other amenities- let us know!

Other things to note
* The creek is tidal. If you plan to be on the water, bring water shoes as the oyster beds are all around and very sharp. We can show you the deepest path of water out to the waterway and beyond. You can access Wrightsville Beach and Masonboro Island from here, though times will vary as tides and wind are a daily factor.

* We are on well water. If you don't like the taste there is a 5 gallon dispenser of water in the apartment that we keep full for drinking or cooking with.

* We love animals, but do not allow dogs or other animals that you might travel with- sorry.

description:

The space
***Cleaning and Sanitizing***

We care deeply about your health and safety while visiting with us at Charmed Beach Gateway, so we want to ensure that our place is cleaned and sanitized before you arrive! We use a cleaning service to clean and disinfect the cottage between guest stays. The cleaning service follows Airbnb’s five-step enhanced cleaning process based on Airbnb’s cleaning handbook that was developed in partnership with experts. Our cleaning service uses CDC approved cleaning and disinfecting products and their staff trained on protocols and wear masks and gloves while cleaning.

Here are a few highlights:
• sanitize all surfaces including fixtures and doorknobs
• use cleaners and disinfects approved by CDC, and wear protective gear to help prevent cross-contamination
• use cleaning checklists to thoroughly clean each room
• linen and towels professional laundered and rotated after each stay
• provide extra cleaning supplies, so you can clean as you stay
• comply with local laws, including any additional safety or cleaning guidelines

Guest access
Guests have access to entire cottage with personal access code to keyless entry system.

Other things to note
Common area with Wi-Fi suitable for workspace.

Go to the websites for Wilmington, Carolina Beach, Kure Beach and Wrightsville Beach for up-to-date information on attractions and calendar of things to do in these locations! These sites can offer great ideas for your next beach vacation getaway!

listing_name: At Greenfield park near amphitheater & Satellite.
description:
Staying at the Greenfield Gathering Place is a walk in the park- literally! A great place for families and get togethers, this cute and stylish 3 BR 2 bath house is situated right next to Greenfield Lake park. Clean modern design, comfy beds, a stocked eat-in kitchen, furnished deck and privacy fenced backyard, and convenient location will provide you a great place to relax after all the fun.

The space
Completely remodeled with new flooring, paint, and fixtures. The modern decor has a clean and uncluttered design. The living room has a comfortable couch and a big smart TV if you’re looking for some relaxation. The chef’s kitchen has a great 5 burner gas stove, granite countertops, big refrigerator, open face cabinets, plenty of cookware, and dinner service for 8. The kitchen bar seats 4 and opens up into the dining room which seats 6. Each bedroom has a queen size bed with a memory foam hybrid mattress and protector. The master bedroom has a full bath and a walk-in closet. Washer/dryer and wifi are included.

The real star of the show is that when you open the back door, walk onto the furnished deck, and then through landscaped backyard on the brick path and open the back gate: you’re in Greenfield Lake Park! You can go around the lake on the 5 mile long walking and biking path, rent a reasonably priced kayak or paddleboat and cruise past the cypress trees in the lake, take the kids to the swing set and playground, enjoy a picnic, or even bring your deck and hit the skatepark! All that is in walking distance to the house, which is located right on Greenfield lake park. I lived here for a number of years and spent countless hours playing with my daughter in the park, jogging around and boating in the lake. This is a beautiful park with terrific foliage and lots of wildlife.

Guest access
You'll have the whole house to yourself! You'll receive access codes for the front door. The Garage is not available to park in or use. We use it for storage, it is locked. There is also on locked closet in the house which is used by the cleaners.

Other things to note
This is a place to chill and relax. We include coffee, a few lite options for breakfast, and basic essentials available for you when you arrive!

We take your vacation and our cleaning seriously—because it matters. Your cleaning fee covers far more than just a spotless space (which you’ll absolutely have).
