description:
You will be 1.5 miles from Novant Health NHRMC main campus making it ideal for travel nurses or healthcare professionals. A very quiet neighborhood - surrounding a country club. Private guest suite, complete with queen size comfy bed, full bathroom, kitchenette, 48” smart TV, mini split AC/Heat unit, and shared laundry machines. You are near to restaurants, movies, museum and cross-city trail walking path! I'm a Novant nurse and will give a travel nurse discount for stays 28 days or longer.

The space
Guests will enjoy the privacy of the newly renovated pied-à-terre, with a separate entrance - Private full bathroom, kitchenette, dining area/work space, and queen bed. The suite is separated from the main house with a dual-lock pocket door. You will have free access to washer/dryer, but will share that with the host once every two weeks. There is a large backyard with deck, fire pit to enjoy.
Bed configuration:
1 queen sized bed
Temperature management:
There is central air conditioning and heating. Southeastern NC has hot, humid summers and mild winters so to supplement the centralized temperature management, there is a ceiling fan and a wall mounted AC/Heat that is remote control operated. Recommend using it on the Automatic setting.

Guest access
I am so happy for your interest to stay at my pied-à-terre. Let me know if you are a Novant traveler so I can offer a special rate!

There are basic rules in place to be sure that your stay at my apartment is mutually satisfying. Please review them, and let me know if you have any questions or concerns. The studio apartment is adjacent to (connected to) my home, and I enjoy hosting like-minded people who will make beautiful memories here while treating it, and my belongings, with respect.

PETS
Pets are not allowed. The only exceptions are Service Animals (dogs) that are required because of a disability. The Service Animal (dog) must be in control, must be housebroken, must not be left alone in the apartment without prior approval, is not allowed in the main house, and must be leashed under the guest's control when on the property (outdoor common spaces). Emotional support pets are not allowed.

ADDITIONAL GUESTS
The suite is best suited for one (1) guest. I have a per-person, per-night fee of $25 when occupancy exceeds 1 person. At the time of booking, please enter in the correct number of guests to receive accurate pricing. The guest number can be altered at any time if anything changes -- however, I must have the correct number of paid people on the reservation agreement.

CHECK-IN
There is an easy keyless process for check-in and check-out. Upon booking, your reservation will be updated to show an August smartlock keypad code to unlock the door.

I aim to provide a 3pm check-in. Unfortunately, I cannot accommodate early check-ins as I have the suite deep cleaned between each stay.

CHECK-OUT
Check-out is at 11am sharp! Guests must vacate the premises no later than 11am on the day ending the lease term. If guests hold over in occupancy of the premises after the expiration of the term, the guests shall become a tenant at sufferance only, at a rental rate of $80 per day, and otherwise subject to the terms and conditions of this reservation, so far as applicable, and shall be liable for all damages sustained by the host on account of such holding over including lost profits.

COMMUNICATION
Communication is extremely important to me! Please be in touch with me during your stay, and please be responsive if I reach out to you. I work from the main home so communication will be easy. Please communicate all needs and requests, through this app, and I will do my best to help you in a timely manner. I generally want to be reasonable, but prefer to operate in my zone of guidelines. I want to re-emphasize the following:


1) Please be sure the exact number of people you intend to sleep in the suite is the exact number of people you booked in the system. Please note that the suite has an outside security camera for its protection. I am reasonable and happy to approve practical requests, and I encourage you to communicate with me during your stay. However, trying to cover or alter the device will result in immediate termination of the reservation agreement, and no refunds will be granted.

2) Deliveries of any items must be made to the suite's side entrance. No delivery items will be accepted for guests at the front door, this includes food delivery. For deliveries, please direct delivery personnel to the right side of the house, follow along the gravel path to the suite entrance.

3) No pets are allowed (except service animals).

4) Smoking is not permitted anywhere on the property, including on driveways and on the outdoor grounds.

6) Please refrain from making loud noises, indoors or outdoors. Quiet hours are from 10pm to 7am.

7) Please be mindful of the furniture and fixtures; and, above all, please respect the space and keep it in pristine condition.

CLEANING, LAUNDRY & TRASH
Deep cleaning is performed in between each reservation. Cleaning products and tools are made available for your use during your stay, however product replenishment (such as paper towels, dish soap, toilet bowl cleaner, toiletries such as shampoo or body soap) is incumbent on the tenant to replace if any run out during a long term stay.
Washer and dryer are available for your use, and will be shared with the host one day per week or every other week, at a preferred time for the guest. Please provide your own detergent, softener and dryer sheets.
There is weekly trash pick-up service on Friday mornings at 7:30am. The city bins (blue- recycling, green- trash)are easily accessible outdoors alongside the driveway.

INSECTS
Please note that the home is regularly serviced for pest control. There are quarterly visits from an exterminator to prevent pests such as Palmetto bugs, which are common in Southeastern NC. Chemicals are sprayed around the perimeter of the house externally. Occasionally, there will be an exterminator who will need to gain access to the indoors space to spray chemicals along the baseboards of the suite. I will communicate their spray schedule ahead of time.

Fire pit
I provide an outdoor fire pit for your enjoyment. You are welcome to use the backyard deck and space.

SUPPLIES
The suite is maintained very well and I do my best to be sure all necessities are stored in the suite. However, if I am missing some items, please let me know and I will do my best effort to replenish these items. Long term stay guests will be expected to provide their own toiletries and paper products.

ADDITIONAL DISCLOSURES
The guests bear all responsibility for their reservation. I am not liable for a discount or cancellation of the reservation agreement for any injury sustained on the property. If there is there is any damage that necessitates urgent repairs that need to be performed due to any cause (including, but not limited to: acts of God, tenant irresponsibility, or equipment failure), the guest will not be compensated for the disruption. The Host shall not be held responsible for such items' failure to work, but will make every effort to correct any issues as reported as quickly as possible. RISK OF LOSS AND INDEMNIFICATION

listing_name: The Jazz House on Water Street
description:
The Jazz House is in the heart of historic downtown Wilmington and just steps away from the riverfront. Hip modern layout with open floor plan, high ceilings, exposed brick walls and adorned in musical décor. Features comfortable beds, a kitchen stocked with cooking basics, a shared courtyard space outdoors, and washer/dryer.

The space
Located directly across the street from the riverwalk and the beautiful Cape Fear River, this condo is situated next to a large variety of great dining options, bars, breweries, water tours, historic tours, museums, and more, but luckily is relatively quiet so you can relax and get some rest after all the fun.


This two room unit features a queen sized bed in the front room with the shutters that open to reveal a huge window which lets in tons of sunlight, provides a great view and offers entertainment watching passers by. The back room is sparse and comes with a full size bed. The bathroom has a standing shower and the kitchen has unique swinging doors and is stocked with all the basics.


You can walk to many places downtown and the condo is just a short ~20 minute drive to Wrightsville Beach and ~30 minute to Carolina Beach.

Like many downtown areas, private parking is typically unavailable. However, street meters, parking lots, and garages are conveniently located nearby. Free parking can be found in the neighborhood along Nun Street between 3rd and 4th. It requires a 3-4 block walk, but it's quite manageable.

Other things to note
Checkout is 11am, but we can offer late checkout as availability allows. 12pm checkout is $20, and 1pm checkout is $30. Please contact us first and if we can accommodate your late checkout, we will be happy to.

listing_name: Fun, Safe, Private Cottage Near Carolina Beach
description:
Private & Safe Beachy Cottage 5 min to Boardwalk, Beach, Stores, Restaurants
*Value for money - many extras
New High School & College Grads Welcome
*1,000 Mbps High Speed Internet & WiFi
*Self Check-In On Your Schedule
* On 3 Acres 1 mile to beach
*Cool Dog OK (fee)
*Easy 24-hour access
*Sleeps 1-8
*Very Clean & Adorable 🫶🫶🌈
*Fresh Linens & Towels
*Full, Open Kitchen
*Lots of Free Parking
*Helpful SuperHosts on Call
*Fire Pit *Patio Set *Gas Grill
* Screened-in porch
FAMILY SAFE &

The space
Great private cottage & yard for making memories!!

The beach is just a mile away, yet the cottage & 3 other Airbnb’s owned by Drew & Tan are tucked away on this largest private estate in the beach area.

Drew & Tan live on the estate and have been Airbnb SuperHosts every quarter since 2015 offering multiple accommodations.. The cottages are all professionally cleaned, sanitized and disinfected for good health.

This cottage is the largest with three large bedrooms, two bathrooms, high speed Internet, premium television channels, full kitchen, patio furniture with fire pit & gas grill.

The Master Bedroom has a high, pillowtop King bed and private bathroom and a Smart TV as well as a desk/make up table & chair.

The two large additional bedrooms each have a queen bed and a single bed.

The living room, kitchen and dining area separate the Master from the other bedrooms.

There is a screened-in porch behind the house facing the fields and this hideaway is 1 mile near the beach where dogs are loved and it’s in natural surroundings of grassy fields and towering Live Oaks adorning Spanish Moss hanging from limbs and a gentle stream on our estate - not a concrete jungle like over the bridge - you will discover you are within a mile of the beaches and 1/2 mile to show, groceries, restaurants, arcades and bars.

Ask us for a list of the top six things to do in this area and also our Locals Guide to the best restaurants and entertainment.

Cool Dogs OK. Professional cleaners complete a deep cleaning protocol and change all filters after guests with pets check out in order to provide a comfortable stay for future guests who may have allergies to pet dander. Therefore, there is a separate charge of $45 per pet for the entire length of your stay so that staff can be paid to perform these protocols upon departure.

** If you are very picky please do not book. However, if you are laid-back and love nature, Live Oak trees with Spanish Moss, Seagulls, Robins and Blue Jay’s flying overhead, fresh air, room to roam on acres of open space and want to have a great time a mile from the ocean, then by all means book this cottage now!**

This adorable family cottage is just off the main highway US 421 - also called Carolina Beach Road because it goes straight Carolina Beach- on a private, 38-acre estate. We rented about 98% occupancy year round, so book now if your dates are available.

We provide clean & sanitized towels in your bathroom and fresh, clean linens on beds prior to check-in. Extra towels available upon request.

We have multiple cottages & cabins listed on Airbnb.

Come and enjoy the privacy and natural beauty here away from the hustle and bustle of Carolina Beach action which is only 1 mile away!

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire, separate guesthouse by themselves and the exclusive use of a screened in porch, an outdoor patio with grill and fire pit and a 5 acre field in the back of the house. There are acres of free parking for additional cars, boats or RVs.

Other things to note
Our driveway is a 1,000 ft. long gravel road just off US Hwy 421 (Carolina Beach Rd.). You turn right on River Road at the last light before crossing the bridge to Carolina Beach and take the first right onto Green Valley Drive which is our driveway. The first 100 feet has dips so drive slowly. Smooth sailing the remainder of the road to your cottage.
Everything you would want is within a few miles either direction. Restaurants, bars, shops, beaches, North Carolina Aquarium, the Fort Fisher Civil War Museum, Walmart, Publix , Harris Teeter, and Food Lion grocery stores, CVS and Walgreens pharmacies , ice cream shops, the Carolina Beach Boardwalk, Historic Riverwalk and Downtown Wilmington, and more, much more. If you want suggestions just text or call us and we will be pleased to give you some ideas and local favorites.
The cottage is ideal for a romantic getaway or up to eight guests. If you need anything, just ask.

listing_name: A little old, a little new, and perfectly quaint!
description:
A home built circa 1920, you will find peace and easy living. Easily accessible to restaurants, the arts scene, wedding venues, and history, this house is perfect place to “home base” while you explore old Wilmington.
A single story dwelling, with the kitchen at the heart of it, it boasts heart pine floors in the original part of the house and oak in the addition that was just completed in 2019. With an en suite and a small sitting area in the master bedroom, it is the perfect place to unwind!

The space
The whole house is yours to explore, as is the back deck and patio. The house is designed for comfort and ease of living. It is located in the historic part of Wilmington, with Live Oak lined streets and 100 year old houses. There are many great restaurants, all within walking distance. The Wilson Center is about a 20 minute walk, and Thalian Hall about 15. The house was built in 1920 and renovated in 2019, adding an addition to the craftman cottage to include a 3rd bedroom with en suite bath. The kitchen was updated to include stainless steel appliances and a gas stove. At the end of a long day, relax with premium 100% cotton bedding and very comfortable memory foam mattresses. The original heart pine floors have been refinished and the original fireplace is still in the Living room. So take a step back in time, but keep all the amenities of today, and come stay in our lovely Wilmington home!

Guest access
The guests have access to the whole interior house, plus the deck, patio, and small yard in back. The garage is for the owners use.

Other things to note
Parking is on the street, but if you need to, you can park directly on the right side of the house. Please be sure to respect the neighbors privacy and property when parking there.

listing_name: Cottage at Greenfield Lake, Airy, Natural Light
description:
5 minute walk to Greenfield Lake Amphitheater, 2 miles to downtown Wilmington, 3 miles to Live Oak Bank Pavilion, 5 miles to UNCW, 11 miles to Wrightsville Beach and 13 miles to Carolina Beach. Lake access is directly across the street, launch your kayak, boat or walk the 3.9 mile loop. Also, a perfect long-term rental, work remotely from a sparkling clean, pet friendly, loft style cottage. Full kitchen with stainless steel appliances. Pamper yourself in the king bed, soaking tub/shower.

The space
Interior
Upon entering the loft style cottage filled with natural light, you are met with high ceilings, modern art, and luxe amenities.
In the living room/dining room, there is a dual purpose coffee table/desk and swivel chair for those who work from home. A sofa which converts into a queen pull out bed with an extra thick mattress and as well as a dining table and chairs to seat four.
The kitchen includes stainless steel appliances, pots, pans, serve ware, coffee maker and Nespresso espresso maker. Also on the first floor is a half bath, a full size washer and dryer and a walk in closet with a sloped ceiling.
The second floor loft bedroom includes a tapestry of Greenfield Lake Amphitheater as well as a king size bed with quality linens. The spacious walk in closet includes hangers, a chest of drawers, portable ironing board and iron for your convenience. Adjacent to the bed is a vanity with mirror and antique chair.
The bathroom includes a large soaking tub and shower with toiletries and lush towels.
Remote controls are provided for the upper level light filtering window shades, ceiling fans and Roku tv.

Exterior
The yard of the cottage is beautifully landscaped with azaleas and a variety of trees. The exterior of the home displays a beautiful mural created by a local artist. The partially fenced yard provides a space to enjoy the outdoor patio and dining set. And of course, there is free off street parking adjacent to the cottage for up two cars.

For nature enthusiasts, Greenfield Lake is located directly across the street.

Restaurants, bars, and breweries are near by too.

Guest access
Guests are welcome to use the outdoor patio area, but are not permitted to access the deck on the main house or enter the greenhouse on the property.

Other things to note
Please read house rules prior to your arrival.

The number of guests listed on the reservation is very important, please make sure it is accurate.

For a reservation for one or two guests, only the king bed will be made.

Cottage is located within city limits, expect to hear traffic noise.

Please note, the driveway narrows between the greenhouse and fence. The opening is 9’.

Window shades on the front windows of the cottage are light filtering.

Check out time is 10:00 unless approved ahead of time.

City of Wilmington Short-Term Lodging Registration Number is STL2019-0394.

listing_name: Historic Downtown Queen bed w/ parking Walk to all
description:
This precious holiday getaway apartment is located upstairs in a beautifully maintained historic home that also houses Heinberg Insurance Agency, a long-running family-owned business and downtown institution. When you stay here, you will enjoy being able to easily walk to all of downtown with easy access by car to the rest of Wilmington. The agency operates 9am-5pm Mon-Fri and 10-2pm on Sat. The apartment is separate and totally private. A queen suite, the space is suitable for 1-2 guests.

The space
Located on 8th and Market Street, the space is just a few minutes walk to the heart of downtown. Up a flight of exterior stairs, the apartment has a small private porch overlooking the parking lot and tree-filled area. The house sits next to the Cape fear museum and catty corner across the street from Wilmington downtown fire station. The apartment has a well-equipped large eat-in kitchen with a full-size refrigerator/ oven/ stove/ microwave/ dishwasher and washer & dryer, and a midcentury modern dining table and 2 chairs. The bedroom is spacious and pretty with a new queen bed, a sofa and a desk. Additionally there is a full bath and a large hall that doubles as living space. WIFI signal is strong as it is shared with the business housed downstairs. This space is comfortable and visitors feel welcome here.

Guest access
Guests have access to a parking spot in the parking lot and their own private balcony as well as the entire apartment which consists of a large kitchen and a large bedroom, full bathroom and large hall that doubles as living space.

Other things to note
This is a sweet private apartment located on the second floor of a historic home. The downstairs of the house is used as an insurance agency where clients come and go throughout the day. Any interaction with the staff of Heinberg Insurance Agency would only happen in the parking area unless a visitor requested otherwise.

My cozy home in mid-town Wilmington is convenient to everything: Historic downtown, UNCW campus, area bike trails and beaches.

listing_name: Cozy Blue Bungalow Walk Downtown! Free parking!
description:
Far enough from Downtown to avoid the noise but close enough to Uber! This 3 BR home is newly renovated, all new fixtures and furniture, clean and modern. The back deck is a peaceful place to relax outside with family or friends. This neighborhood is quiet, yet close all Downtown activities. Off-street parking, dine-in kitchen with gas stove, open living room with an oversized couch, TV's in every room and wifi, comfy new memory foam beds, new walk-in shower, front load washer/dryer, Fence Yar

The space
As you pull up to the Cozy Blue Bungalow, you’ll notice that it stands out from the historic homes on the street. Built in the 1970s by a local doctor who rented out most of the homes in the area, this little bungalow has been lovingly restored. While it’s compact at 900 square feet, it offers all the essentials for a comfortable stay.

With three bedrooms, the bungalow can accommodate up to 6 guests, but please note that the space is best suited for smaller groups. If you’re traveling with a larger party, be aware that the one bathroom and cozy living areas may feel a bit tight for 6 people. We recommend groups of 3, with one guest per bedroom, for the most comfortable experience.

The kitchen, while small, is fully renovated and stocked with everything you need, including a gas stove. The adjoining living room features a large smart TV where you can stream your favorite shows. All the beds are new, with hybrid mattresses that our guests love, and each bedroom has its own smart TV.

Though the bathroom is compact, the on-demand hot water system ensures you’ll never run out, even with multiple showers. Outside, relax on the back porch, or take a short walk to downtown Wilmington to enjoy the many dining options the area has to offer.

Guest access
The entire house is yours as is the back yard and parking in the front.

Other things to note
-About Our Cleaning Fee and Checkout instructions:
We take your vacation and our cleaning seriously—because it matters. Your cleaning fee covers far more than just a spotless space (which you’ll absolutely have). It also includes fresh linens, fully stocked coffee and snacks, bottled water, and the time it takes our team to prepare the home properly for every stay.
Most importantly: we never ask guests to clean before they leave. That’s exactly what the cleaning fee is for.
Our checkout instructions are intentionally simple:
• Let us know when you’re heading out (so we can get started for the next guest)
• Lock the door
That’s it. Relax, enjoy your stay, and leave the rest to us.

description:
Welcome to your Wilmington retreat! This single-story, family-friendly ranch is 2 miles from Wrightsville Beach and close to Mayfaire’s shopping, dining, and entertainment. The home features a spacious king suite, multiple beds, and cozy outdoor spaces, including a screened front porch with a gas fire pit, and bikes to ride around town. Nearby attractions include UNC Wilmington, Airlie Gardens, Riverwalk, trampoline parks, and local beaches. *Pet Fee Required* No Cats

The space
Welcome to your ideal Wilmington retreat! This bright and spacious single-story ranch is perfect for all ages, located just 2 miles from Wrightsville Beach and within biking distance to Mayfaire Shopping Center’s restaurants, shops, and movie theaters. The home offers a comfortable king suite and multiple beds for family and friends, with open, airy spaces for relaxing together.

Outdoor living is at its best here: enjoy the screened-in front porch with a gas fire pit and TV for cozy evenings, or soak up some sun on the open rear patio. This property is close to popular attractions like UNC Wilmington, local coffee shops, scenic trails, and family-friendly trampoline parks. Golf enthusiasts can enjoy Wrightsville Green Par 3 and nearby frisbee golf courses, while nature lovers will find themselves just a short drive from Airlie Gardens and the scenic Riverwalk downtown.

Wilmington offers endless things to do: explore the vibrant Historic District with its charming boutiques and cafes, take a riverboat tour along the Cape Fear River, or enjoy the area’s renowned beaches, including Wrightsville, Carolina, and Kure Beach, perfect for surfing, paddleboarding, and beachcombing. The nearby Battleship North Carolina and the Cameron Art Museum offer unique, family-friendly experiences.

This home is ideally situated for experiencing the best of Wilmington while offering a peaceful neighborhood setting for evening strolls and outdoor activities. Small dogs are welcome with a $100 pet fee per pet (pre-approval required), but cats are not permitted. Relax, explore, and enjoy Wilmington from this comfortable, accessible home!

description:
This is one unit of a side-by-side duplex with an amazing garden located in midtown. You'll love the carefully curated and landscaped backyard, with a coi pond, water fountains, and nearly year round flowers. Nestled in a cute community, and super convenient to grocery stores, shopping, UNCW, 10 min to Wrightsville Beach, 20 min to Carolina Beach. Located on a bike trail that runs from the Cape Fear River to downtown and the ocean!!

The space
This cute 2BR is located right in midtown Wilmington! The garden is remarkable: relax outside smelling the flowers, hearing the birds singing, you will love to stay here! As you enter the garden, you'll be under a pagoda with a tiled patio, where you can enjoy the outdoors even in the rain. Then you'll see an an incredibly peaceful landscape of native plants, tropical delights, a variety of flowers so there are nearly year round blooms, a coi pond, water fountains, and brick and cobblestone pathways throughout the garden. It's hard to put into words how relaxing and peaceful it is. Then at night, the garden automatically lights up and is simply stunning. The palm trees in the front yard light up as well. There's a loquat tree in the backyard that has delicious fruit for you to enjoy when it's in season.

The home is completely remodeled with new everything, and is nice, clean, and updated. The kitchen is stocked with all the basics and a coffee and snack bar. The spacious living room has comfortable seating and a large Roku smart TV and wifi. Vaulted ceilings throughout, dining room with table, washer/dryer. Each bedroom has a brand new comfy queen memory foam/gel hybrid mattress with mattress protector.

Romantic getaway, family trip, or weekend with friends, Ada's Midtown Garden will surely be a memorable trip for everyone.

Guest access
You'll have access to your private half of the duplex, your own driveway for parking, and your own portion of the back yard oasis.

Other things to note
This is a medium sized house that is a duplex. The house is surrounded by gardens. Each side of the house has its own private outdoor oasis!

-About Our Cleaning Fee and Checkout instructions:
We take your vacation and our cleaning seriously—because it matters. Your cleaning fee covers far more than just a spotless space (which you’ll absolutely have). It also includes fresh linens, fully stocked coffee and snacks, bottled water, and the time it takes our team to prepare the home properly for every stay.
Most importantly: we never ask guests to clean before they leave. That’s exactly what the cleaning fee is for.
Our checkout instructions are intentionally simple:
• Let us know when you’re heading out (so we can get started for the next guest)
• Lock the door
That’s it. Relax, enjoy your stay, and leave the rest to us.

description:
Contemporary Carriage House in the heart of Wilmington, on a historic property with tranquil garden & neighborhood views. The property is accessed from a quiet alley & includes covered parking beneath the unit. Two gracious bedrooms have large picture window views of a historic Azalea Festival garden & former coronation grounds. Bathroom has a double vanity & custom tile tub/shower. Lots of natural light adorns the open kitchen & living room. In unit laundry & dishwasher included.

The space
The unit was designed and built by the owner/architect in 2020 and completed in March of 2021. It is nestled in the Country Club Pines neighborhood of Wilmington, on a site that hosted some of the first Azalea Festival garden tours beginning in the 1940's. Inside the unit, there is an open living room with big screen TV, and a cozy hanging chair by the corner picture windows for reading and relaxing. Some books and games are available in the unit for guest use. There are two private bedrooms, one with a King bed & the second with two twins.
A queen sleeper sofa is located in the living room. Coffee and Tea are provided in the unit, as well as basic cooking essentials. A pack 'n play portable crib is available upon request.

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire 2nd level apartment and two parking spaces. (one covered). More parking may be available upon request. There is also a small outdoor area with seating.

Other things to note
Please keep your vehicles and any other valuables not inside the apartment, locked up and secure. Arrangements can be made with me to store items in the ground floor garage if required.

description:

The space
Located above Wilmington’s Riverwalk, this 1BR Water Street Center condo commands an incredible downtown location. You’re at the heart of the Historic District -- just blocks from shopping, fine dining, and nightlife. 1 mile walk to the Live Oak Bank Pavilion at Riverfront Park.
This top-floor (yes there is elevators), end-unit retreat has a private balcony overlooking Cape Fear River, Cape Fear Memorial Bridge, and Battleship North Carolina. You’re also just a 20-minute drive from Wrightsville Beach.

BEDROOM & BATHROOM

The bedroom features a comfy queen bed and a 45” flat-screen TV with Roku.
The bathroom is equipped with a spacious vanity and a tub/shower combination.
We will have 2 wash, 2 hand, 3 bath towels and a floor mat for you in the bathroom with enough toiletries to get you started. If you are staying longer or more than 2 people we suggest bring anything extra you need with you. 4 Guests MAX!
OUTDOOR AREAS
Step out onto your private balcony and take in views of Cape Fear River and Battleship North Carolina.

Free parking pass for one car is available after you check-in at the city parking deck 2 blocks away. $100 fee if pass is not in unit after departure.

~NO PETS

~NO smoking this includes the balcony!

Guest access
We will send you self check-in instructions a couple days prior to your arrival. There is NO parking on the premises but you are allowed 15 minutes to load/unload. Once in the unit we have a free parking pass for 1 vehicle at the city parking garage 2 blocks away.

You will have an experience to stay in historic home and feel an atmosphere of old Wilmington .
It is cozy, private, and secure. ( laundry room is shared with other tree tenants, but everything else will be keep complete privacy).
This place is located on second floor and we have 21 steps to go there.

The space
The our historic landmark house was built in 1889. It has 7000 sq feet space and divides in several fully equipped apartments. Some of them we set up as Airbnb.
It was completely renovated last year with the help of European master carpenter.
We try to give every space an individual historic boost and keep it a little whimsical..
We also have couple tenants and a host, Natasha Caine , lives here, in the same house.
The house has unique setting and it gives an illusion that you are only guest in entire place. Some of separate entrances, multiple levels, windows facing in different detections do it well..
Our guest are coming back home relaxed, happy , and fully recharged their inner energy “batteries “.

Guest access
Each guests will have a private entrance and full apartment with everything they want to have for romantic and memorable vacation..
Shortly we plan to have even more loving and inviting garden area, with pond of gold fish and shady recliners.. we are already almost there!

Other things to note
The keeping everyone’s privacy solid is our motto. We expect that our guests respect other people privacy as well.
In short future we will have some vine and finger food evening in the garden…

listing_name: The Zen Den - A quaint Private Oasis room w/ Bath
description:
Early check in/late check out: $25

Looking to escape for a bit or enjoy a peaceful environment for a bit? The Zen Den is a private room with a private entrance, stocked with everything to make your stay as pleasurable as possible!

The Zen Den is an additional room, added onto the century old home quite some time ago, but has recently been remodeled with a full private bathroom. The Den is 1 mile from downtown, 8 miles from the beach.

Two other airbnb spaces are on the property.

The space
Located in the city, please do not book if that doesn't suit you or you don't fair well with a family home. The Zen Den is located the back of the home, through the backyard gate with a wooden fence. It is a quaint, cozy space (not large) with a personal A/C-heater wall unit to adjust the temperature upon arrival. The room shares a wall with one other airbnb room suite, and the backyard is shared with the host family and all airbnb units on the property (3 in total). Please understand it will not be totally quiet all of the time. We are respectful of quiet hours.

Guest access
You will have access to your own private bathroom within the room and a closet space. Within the room you will find a coffee/tea corner, mini fridge, counter space with pull out stools, a relaxing chair, and a dehumidifier and sound machine to block out noise and/or dehumidify the southern air!

During your stay
Hosts live within the home downstairs, in a separate entrance from the Zen Den. Dylan is the owner/operator of Retroscape, a new retro video game lounge blocks away from the home!

Dylan also works as a content creator/videographer for the family business, Pierce Productions. Ann Marie is a youth running coach, photographer for Pierce Productions, mother, and school teacher on break, as she raises our son born in December of 2019.

We allow you to make the decision if you would like us to interact or allow you privacy and time alone. We are here to make your stay as pleasurable as possible.

You may hear us go about our lives from time to time because we do live on the other side of the wall. We also have children who are active outdoor kids! We don't utilize a lot of technology so they can truly be kids!!

We provide noise cancelling options such as the personal AC/heater, sound machine, dehumidifier, bluetooth radio, and TV. We have a sound machine on our side so we do not hear guests and respect your privacy.

Other things to note
The door that leads into the home is securely locked from our kitchen. You have your own entrance to the Zen Den from the back lot of the home with a key pad. Because we live on the same floor and our kitchen is where the second door leads, you may hear us going about getting meals ready in the kitchen and cleaning.

We can't really hear guests, but it may be easier for you to hear us, so we provide a radio, TV, noise machine, dehumidifier, fan, personal A/C, and heater which serve well as additional noise blockers if needed. We are always respectful.

There is one shared wall with an additional airbnb suite. We ask that everyone is respectful of one another.

The bungalow has 3 bedrooms and 1 bath, living room, kitchen, and front porch.

listing_name: Lavender Guesthouse - A Private Oasis Downtown.
description:
A peaceful garden guesthouse in the heart of downtown. This property has a lot to offer if you would like to experience Wilmington's Downtown and Beaches but still would like to unwind somewhere a bit more peaceful.
We offer a full kitchen stocked with all the utensils you may need. A Nespresso machine is available to enjoy cafe quality coffee and espresso while sitting on the covered porch or out in the garden.
The gardens and outdoor seating are yours to enjoy while staying as our guests.

The space
Our 1940's guesthouse is located in the heart of downtown. We have tried to maintain the historic charm with slight modern renovations. This guesthouse is only accessible by climbing 13 stairs. If pre- arranged we can help assist with luggage needs. Downtown city noise is to be expected from time to time as well as airplane noise. We have keypads installed for effortless arrivals.

Other things to note
The windows are not meant to be open. Do to their age and layers of paint, opening the windows can be dangerous. If you would like some fresh air, we have plenty of outdoor space to enjoy. Abiding by this will ensure that the house stays cool if you wish, and the bugs stay out.

description:

It is located in a quiet neighborhood right in the center of town and less than a mile to shopping, dining, and movies. 15 minutes from Downtown, Carolina Beach, and Wrightsville Beach. listing_name: Diamond In The Ruff | FREE Pickleball
description:
Welcome to your vibrant warehouse retreat! This stylish 3BR/2BA apartment blends modern comfort with unique character—featuring a cozy entry, sleek kitchen, and tropical-inspired living space.

Unwind in the shared outdoor area or enjoy the game room with foosball, Golden Tee II, darts, and more. Pet-friendly and full of good vibes. Connected to The Underground East—your stay includes one free hour of pickleball at The Underground East!

The space
Make yourself at home in this beautifully updated 3BR/2BA apartment designed for comfort, style, and good vibes all around. Pet-friendly and perfect for your furry companions, you’ll also have access to a spacious shared green area by the pond—complete with a fire pit, charcoal grill, and picnic table for laid-back nights and memorable hangouts.

The best part? You’re right next to The Underground East, a 24/7 indoor pickleball facility—and your stay includes one FREE hour of play. Whether you're here to relax or rally, it’s the ultimate bonus.

Just minutes from downtown Wilmington’s top breweries, restaurants, and the Riverwalk—and only a quick 15-minute drive to the beach—this modern, pristine apartment is the perfect spot for family trips, couples’ escapes, or a fun girls’ weekend you won’t forget.

Guest access
Important Information: Shared Spaces

Your apartment is private and secure with its own lock, but some areas in the building are shared. You'll share the game room, entryway, and the laundry facilities (washer and dryer), all located in the game room, with guests in the apartment below you. Please note, the game room and laundry facilities are available for use between 9:00 AM and 9:30 PM.

There's also a communal recreation area by the pond at the end of the driveway that's shared. The grill and fire pit in this area is available on a first-come, first-served basis; please be considerate of other guests who may be waiting. We kindly ask that you keep all shared common areas clean and tidy. We appreciate your cooperation!

Other things to note
Our Pet Policy

We're delighted to welcome your well-behaved, four-legged family members to our vacation rental! To ensure a comfortable stay for all guests and to maintain the quality of our property, please review our pet policy below.

General Pet Guidelines:

Prior Approval Required: Please inform us at the time of booking if you plan to bring a pet. We need to know the type, breed, and weight of your pet. We reserve the right to limit the number or size of pets.

Pet Fee: An additional $25 per pet, per night will be applied to your reservation. This non-refundable fee helps cover the additional cleaning required after a pet's stay.

House-Trained & Well-Behaved: All pets must be fully house-trained and well-behaved. Excessive barking or disruptive behavior that impacts other guests or neighbors is not permitted.

Leash Policy: Pets must be kept on a leash whenever outside the apartment.

Waste Disposal: Guests are responsible for immediately cleaning up and properly disposing of all pet waste in designated outdoor receptacles. Please do not leave pet waste anywhere on the property or in the communal green areas.

No Pets on Furniture/Beds: To protect our furnishings, pets are not permitted on furniture or beds. Please bring your pet's own bedding and crate (if applicable) for their comfort. Additional cleaning fees may apply if pet hair is found on furniture or bedding.

Damage Responsibility: Pet owners are solely responsible for any and all damages caused by their pet to the property, inside or out, including but not limited to scratching, chewing, digging, accidents, or excessive hair. Any damages will be charged to the guest.

Crating Recommended: If you plan to leave your pet unattended in the apartment, we highly recommend crating them to prevent anxiety and potential damage to the property.

Flea/Tick Prevention: Please ensure your pet is up-to-date on flea and tick prevention treatments prior to arrival.

Important Note for Service Animals:
We comply with all applicable laws regarding service animals. Service animals are not subject to pet fees or breed/size restrictions. Please inform us if you are bringing a service animal (as defined by law) so we can ensure appropriate accommodations.

Shared Spaces Reminder:
While your apartment is private, please remember that the entry hallway, game room, washer/dryer, beach toys, and outdoor communal recreation area (including the pond area and grill) are shared with the Studio apartment on the first floor. Please be considerate of other guests when using these areas with your pet, and ensure they are clean and tidy after use.

By booking our pet-friendly rental, you agree to adhere to all terms of this pet policy. Failure to comply may result in additional charges or early termination of your stay without refund.

We look forward to hosting you and your furry friend!

description:
Framed by hundreds of years old live oak trees, The Cove is situated on an acre of ground, convenient to area beaches and shopping. Most major food chains and big box stores are within a 5 minute drive. Additionally many local eateries are nearby. Carolina beach is an easy 10 minutes drive, historic downtown Wilmington and river walk are 15 minutes, while Wrightsville beach and major shopping malls are 20 minutes.
See the below description to get a feel for this very special and unique space.

The space
The grounds around the land have been extensively landscaped. Subtropical in style, and a gardeners dream, there are flowers in bloom year round to compliment the lush palm and shrub garden. Feel free to enjoy and ask any questions. All grounds are smoke free and vape free.
The rental space is the ground floor of this small country cottage. Recently renovated, it is an open studio type with one queen bed, wifi, and smart TV. A full bath and kitchen complete the area with a private screened in porch. Parking is steps away and a circle drive allows easy entry and exit.
Now the bad part... Myrtle Grove was once a sleepy quiet neighborhood. Since the areas tremendous growth the road is more heavily traveled. Some locals have saved money for months to purchase the loudest muffler systems known to man, but things always calm down by 6:30 or so in the evening.
Another note - The space is a conversion from the original garage and one beam is about 6'3\ high

description:

Directly in between Pleasure Island and downtown ILM (15 minute drive to either), this suite gives you a clean, quiet place to rest and restore. listing_name: Hot Tub, Close To Downtown, Concerts and Beaches!
description:
Just 10 minutes to downtown Wilmington, 20 minutes to the beaches and close to everything the area has to offer, Capt.'s Cottage is a cozy, small home that's equipped with a washer/dryer, streaming TV's, comfy bedding and full kitchen to make your stay comfortable. Guests love the private patio and large yard for unwinding and relaxing. Wether you're here for a concert, wedding, weekend getaway, or just exploring, you'll love Capt.'s Cottage.

The space
Captain's Cottage is a cozy, relaxed, light filled small home that offers Roku ready TV's, fast WiFi, 2 bedrooms (1 queen and 1 pull out single sofa bed), full bath, all new appliances featuring a stack unit washer/dryer, range, fridge, microwave and cooking and dining utensils. A relaxing fenced patio with outdoor shower and chiminea await you at the end of your days at the beach.

We've put a lot of sweat equity into this little cottage to bring it back to life from years of neglect and we hope you'll love it too! When we first saw the cottage several years ago we looked beyond the state it was in at the time and knew it had great character and would make an ideal getaway. While the Captain's Cottage is small it's got great bones and coastal inspired touches that we hope our guests enjoy as much as we've enjoyed bringing this little gem back to life!

History of Captain's Cottage

Located in historic Sunset Park in beautiful Wilmington, North Carolina, the cottage started its life in the early 1940's as a single room fishing shack that was constructed on the north end of Carolina Beach, about 20 minutes away. Years later the house was moved to its current location and a small addition and bathroom were added making the house a grand total of 600 sq ft (tiny house living at it's best!). Eventually the house became home to WM Register, a tug boat captain that worked his days on the Cape Fear River, and his wife, Gladys. After WM and Gladys moved out the house was sold and used as a rental property that fell into serious neglect and disrepair for many years.

The interior had a flooring mix of tile, carpet and various hardwoods, neon paint throughout, cracks in the drywall and holes in the ceilings. The cottage had settled so much that the back left corner in the kitchen was sitting on the ground. Since the house was sitting mostly on the ground most of the windows barely opened and doors were crooked. To fix the issue the entire house was lifted 14 inches with 2 twenty ton air jacks so new joists and piers could be placed under the house. As the house was raised the original iron bathtub fell through the floor so the bathroom had to be removed and a new floor installed along with plumbing and new shower/tub. After almost 6 months of stripping this property back to the studs we finished the complete renovation with new plumbing and electrical systems, new roof, new flooring, new drywall throughout, new interior doors and brand new appliances.

Although the house has been renovated inside the yard and gardens continue under renovation and are always a work in progress to bring them back to how Gladys kept them when she lived here while adding various coastal plant and tree updates. Gladys kept an immaculate yard and her garden beds were full of azaleas, perennial flowers, specimen trees and shrubs native to the area. Over the years the yard became overgrown with vines, poison ivy, sand spurs and invasive trees. To date, we've eradicated the poison ivy and removed much of the underbrush and cleaned up overgrown trees to bring back the live oaks and save some native plantings. Returning a neglected landscape to a healthy state takes time and planning so we're still in the process of working on the gardens and yard to return it to the original layout that Gladys left so many years ago. There's a very large oak tree in the side yard that houses our resident owl, Ollie. If you're lucky you may catch a glimpse of Ollie going and coming out of the hole in the side of the tree. We're excited to see the process and changes in the landscape, albeit slow, but we know as we get closer to bringing these gardens back to life our guests will enjoy them just as much as we do.

You'll find this is a terrific location in Wilmington's oldest neighborhood that's seeing a lot of revitalization on every street. Captain's Cottage is a great spot to base out of if you're in town to attend a concert, visit the area beaches, visit family, for work or just to come enjoy all that Wilmington has to offer. With plenty of parking, this property offers fisherman and outdoors folks a great option to park your boats and store your outdoor gear.

*Please note:

- We take extra care to disinfect frequently touched surfaces and clean all linens between reservations. We ask that all guest adhere to the check-in (anytime after 2 PM) and check-out (by 11 AM) schedules to give us plenty of time to make sure the property has been thoroughly cleaned and sanitized.

- If guests decide to leave early the nights not spent are not refunded.

- We DO NOT ALLOW PETS. While we love dogs and cats and have several of our own, we simply can not allow pets in this property due to previous guests pet's causing damage and other guests having pet allergies. Unfortunately, if we find you have brought a pet you will be asked to leave, your deposit will be forfeited and you will be charged an extra cleaning fee.

Guest access
Guests will have full access to the entire property.

Other things to note
- If guests decide to leave early the nights not spent are not refunded.

- We DO NOT ALLOW PETS. While we love dogs and cats and have several of our own, we simply can not allow pets in this property due to the small space, previous guests pet's causing damage to the property and other guests having pet allergies. Unfortunately, if we find you have brought a pet you will be asked to leave, your deposit will be forfeited and you will be charged an extra cleaning fee.

- 3 minutes (1 mile) to Greenfield Lake

- 8 minutes (3 miles) to Downtown Wilmington

- 9 minutes (3.2 miles) to The Wilson Center

- 11 minutes (3.7 miles) to Live Oak Pavilion

- 15 minutes (6 miles) to Wilmington Airport (ILM)

- 18 minutes (12.5 miles) to Carolina Beach

- 19 minutes (10 miles) to Wrightsville Beach

- 57 minutes (44 miles) to Topsail Beach

- 2 Hours to Raleigh (135 miles) and 2 hours 11 minutes (148 miles) to Raleigh-Durham International Airport (RDU)

- 1 hour 28 minutes (76 miles) to Myrtle Beach

- 1 hour 36 minutes (89 miles) to Interstate 95

Spend your days exploring the historic downtown Riverwalk, dining at Wilmington’s top restaurants, strolling through nearby walkable neighborhoods, or heading to Wrightsville or Carolina beaches just a 15-20 minute drive away.

The Side Piece Cottage is a cozy vintage 2BR retreat in Wilmington, minutes from downtown and a short walk to Greenfield Lake amphitheater.

Enjoy a fenced yard, side porch for morning coffee, and thoughtful extras like snacks, toiletries, games, premium bedding, and a fully stocked kitchen for an easy stay.

✔ 10 minutes to downtown Wilmington
✔ 20 minutes to Wrightsville Beach or Carolina Beach
✔ Short walk to Greenfield Lake & amphitheater

The space
The Side Piece Cottage is a cozy vintage 2BR retreat in Wilmington, NC designed for slow mornings, easy evenings, and everything in between. Thoughtful touches, vintage character, and guest-loved extras make it feel like a stay you’ll want to stretch out just a little longer. Perfect for a Wilmington getaway near downtown, Greenfield Lake, and the beaches, with a private fenced yard, side porch, and all the comforts of home.

LIVING ROOM
The “stay awhile and cancel your plans” zone.

Where “just grabbing coffee” turns into actually enjoying your morning.

Sleep like you don’t have responsibilities tomorrow.

✔ Queen-size Nectar memory foam or Brooklyn Hybrid mattresses that take sleep very seriously

✔ Bedside nightstand with lamp

Cozy space with main-character energy.

✔ Overhead rain shower for an easy, spa-like reset after a long day
✔ Soft, organic cotton towels that feel as good as they look
✔ Toiletries so you can travel lighter than your suitcase suggests

OUTDOOR SPACE
Where time slows down whether you planned it or not.

✔ Fully fenced backyard for privacy, peace, and zero interruptions
✔ Side porch made for slow morning coffee and ignoring your phone
✔ Outdoor seating for unwinding in the fresh air
✔ Quiet space that somehow makes you breathe deeper

The “oh wow” moment guests remember.

✔ Snacks for immediate arrival satisfaction
✔ Toiletries for anything you forgot
✔ Games for nights when going out feels ambitious
✔ Thoughtful extras that make you feel genuinely well taken care of
✔ Beach chairs so you don’t have to pack or buy your own

Convenient enough to explore, quiet enough to avoid regret.

✔ The bathroom features a classic clawfoot tub with shower. Guests should be comfortable stepping in and out of the tub, as it does not include a handrail.

WE'RE HERE FOR YOU
We want you to have a 5-star stay. If anything comes up during your visit, please reach out right away so we can help and make things right.

Please review and follow the full House Rules before your stay.

EASY CHECK-OUT
No cleaning required before you leave—no chores or long lists. Your vacation is for relaxing, not cleaning.

ADDITIONAL STAYS

The home is professionally cleaned and prepared after each stay to ensure a comfortable arrival for every guest.

The cottage is stocked with pillows, throw blankets, games, and other thoughtful touches to help you feel at home. Please keep these items in the home so all guests can enjoy them.

THANK YOU
We truly appreciate you staying with us and look forward to hosting you.

listing_name: Minimal Jet Setter | No Cleaning Fee!
description:
*PLEASE READ ENTIRE LISTING DETAILS*
Spacious, minimalist retreat that is close to the ILM airport (~10 mins)! You are one turn away from the intersection that takes you straight to Wrightsville Beach (~20 mins/6 miles) or directly downtown (~10 mins). We're in a family-friendly neighborhood right off I-40 & 7 mins from the heart of town. We're sustainably-minded with thrifted pieces & many non-toxic amenities. This is a private room on the main floor of our house accessed via our front door.

The space
Welcome to our Minimal Jet Setter Room — a peaceful, minimalist space with calming decor and subtle Wilmington charm. Stretch out, do some yoga, or just unwind after a day of exploring.

This private guest room with en-suite bathroom is on the main floor of our home and accessed through the front door. While our kitchen and living room are on the same floor and not physically separated from the guest room, they are not shared with guests. Our room(s) are upstairs, offering a respectful balance of privacy and presence.

If you're looking for complete seclusion or a fully self-contained stay, an apartment or cottage may be a better fit. Otherwise, we’d love to host your stay!

• FULL-size bed with hybrid mattress is perfect for a single traveler, but extra cozy for a couple. It's complete with linens, several pillows, and extra blankets (or a ceiling fan, if you prefer)
• Wifi and TV with Netflix access
• Sustainability-conscious and mostly non-toxic extras
• A few of our favorite snacks
• Adjoining private bathroom ensuite with a standard shower/tub combo, fresh towels, and common toiletries if you forget to pack something
• A pair of beach towels, if needed
• Visitor parking spots throughout the neighborhood on our cul-de-sac and street parking is fine during the day
• No-contact check-in
• No animals of any kind allowed due to host's severe allergies

We love our home and spend time here often. Because of the proximity of the room to our main living area and our residence being on the 2nd floor, there will be routine noise during the hours of 7am-11pm. Occasionally, we have late-evening or early-morning commitments and will enter/exit via our garage access door, which is directly across from the room, but we do our best to be as quiet as possible.

~ WHAT OUR GUESTS LOVE ABOUT OUR SPACE ~
• The cleanliness and spacious decluttered area
• The extra & thoughtful touches
• The proximity of our space to downtown Wilmington and Wrightsville Beach (6 miles to both)
• Our speedy & transparent communication. We're a quick message away! We value communicative guests.

Guest access
-Private room and adjoining bathroom.
-Front porch and back deck (shared with hosts).

During your stay
We live well in our home, so we will usually be in the kitchen and living room on weeknights, which is why we don't prefer to share these areas, but we are always down for a quick chat! We're available to message through the AirBnB app from 7am-10pm.

Other things to note
*Please message us first, BEFORE booking, if you have specific questions or needs.*
• EARLY CHECK-IN: early check-in available with $15 fee and host approval at least 2 days prior to arrival date; early check-in time can vary & will be decided by host.
• LATE CHECK OUT: late check out available with $25 fee and host approval at least 2 days prior to arrival date. Late check-out fee also applies to those without prior approval. Must check out before 1:30pm or you must book an extra night.
• CLEANING: We don't charge a cleaning fee, don't be the reason we start. Charges may incur if extra or deep cleaning is required after you check out at the hosts' discretion.
• CHILDREN: This property is not suitable for children under 12 due to safety concerns & delicate furnishings, including multiple fragile/breakable decor items in the home, as well as unchildproofed areas like staircases and glass furniture, which may pose safety risks.
• ANIMALS: No animals of any kind allowed due to host's severe allergies
• PARKING: Marked \Visitor\" parking spots throughout neighborhood.
• NOT INCLUDED: Iron

listing_name: Central Townhome 6 Min to Beach & Shopping!
description:
Perfectly located just 6 minutes from Wrightsville Beach and the shops and restaurants of Mayfaire Town Center, this 3-bedroom retreat offers the ideal blend of coastal charm and modern comfort. With Two king beds, Two Twin XLs and 2 workspaces, there’s room for families or friends to spread out and unwind. Enjoy morning coffee or dinner al fresco on the private, fenced-in patio—complete with an outdoor dining set and umbrella for shade. Simple, stylish, and close to everything!

The space
KEY FEATURES:

➝ Spacious corner townhome by the beach!
➝ 3 Bedrooms, 3 Full Bathrooms
➝ Full Kitchen w/Appliances &
➝ High-speed wifi + TV in Living Room + Primary Bedroom
➝ In-Unit Washer & Dryer
➝ Free, Designated Parking

☆☆BEDROOMS☆☆

➝ Bedroom 1: 1 King Bed w/ensuite bathroom (2nd Floor)
➝ Bedroom 2: 2 Single Beds (2nd Floor)
➝ Bedroom 3: 1 King Bed (1st Floor)

Bedrooms come with linens and ready-made beds along with towels for each guest.

☆☆BATHROOMS☆☆

➝ Bathroom 1- Ensuite w/ Tub/Shower Combo
➝ Bathroom 2- Ensuite w/ Tub Combo
➝ Bathroom 3- Hallway Bathroom w/ Tub/Shower Combo

You'll find the bathrooms stocked with complimentary essentials of shampoo, conditioner, and body wash, so you can travel light and still enjoy all the essentials of a relaxing stay.

☆☆KITCHEN & LIVING ROOM☆☆

The open-concept living area invites you to relax in style. Settle into the comfy couch or two accent chairs in front of the fireplace, with a Smart TV mounted above for streaming your favorite shows.

Just steps away, the dining table seats four, with additional bar seating for three—perfect for sharing meals or morning coffee.

The fully equipped kitchen includes all the essentials: full-size appliances, cookware, utensils, and everything you need to feel right at home.

☆☆OUTSIDE SPACE☆☆

Just off the living room, the same doors that provide lots of natural light in the home, provide access to the fully-fenced private patio with dining table and umbrella shade. Use this space to unwind in the evenings with a glass of wine, or enjoy the Wilmington weather!

☆☆HOME DISTANCE IN MILES & MINUTES☆☆

Make sure to balance the chill time with a bit of thrill! Here are some activities, attractions & things to do in the area.

➝ Wilmington Int'l Airport (ILM): 10 miles, 20 minutes
➝ Wrightsville Beach: 2.5 miles, 7 minutes
➝ Mayfaire Town Center: 1.6 miles, 5 minutes
➝ University of North Carolina Wilmington (UNCW): 3.5 miles, 8 minutes
➝ Downtown Wilmington: 12 miles, 15 minutes
➝ Lumina Station (Shopping & Dining): 0.8 miles, 4 minutes
➝ Airlie Gardens: 0.7 miles, 3 minutes
➝ Museum of Coastal Carolina: 18 miles
➝ Children's Museum of Wilmington: 8.3 miles, 15 minutes

Guest access
Guests will have access to the entire 3-bedroom townhome during their stay as well as all amenities listed for use.

Other things to note
Upon your arrival, we offer essential items like hand soap, dish soap, toilet paper, paper towels, and trash bags to start you off. For longer stays, kindly prepare to replenish these supplies according to your personal requirements.

We ask that you take care of the home as if it were your own. We hope to provide a great space for all guests to unwind and relax during their time here!

description:
Located in the center Wilmingtons most historic row of houses. Your Mansion district downtown condo is your relaxing getaway. Enjoy private access to this first floor condo with comfortable furnishings, a huge front porch & free parking downtown (yay!). Walk out the front or back door to see the most beautiful houses around!

The space
Situated right downtown in a beautiful historic row of mansions, you'll find this condo has old world charm paired with modern amenities. The vintage hardwood floors, baseboards, bay window with window seat, and decorative non-working fireplace take you back in time to the 1800's, but the comfortable furniture, clean atmosphere, stocked kitchen, comfy bed, smart TV, and wifi meet today's traveler's needs. This condo is one of five in a large historic house on Front Street.

Guest access
Your condo is private with a private entrance, and is one of 5 is an amazing historic home. You can chill out on the large wrap around front porch near your front door or sit outside your back door on the patio. You’ll have access to a shared laundry room with coin operated machines inside. You'll also get one parking pass to park a normal size car or small pickup behind the house (free parking in downtown Wilmington!!)

Other things to note
Parking:
Free parking behind the house: You have one (1) free parking spot! The alley entrance to the parking area is 9 feet wide. That means you cannot fit a large work van or a big work truck and trailers are not allowed.

Free Parking on the Street: Everyone in Wilmington knows that street parking is a drag unless you know a local with a Historic District Parking Pass. Now you do. If your truck is too big, or you need more than one space we can get you a parking pass. Contact us, pay a $50.00 deposit (returned when the pass is returned) and you'll get a parking pass that you can use on any non metered space downtown and park free!!

Laundry:
There is an on site laundry facility. We try and keep soaps in there in case you need some. The machines and the laundry room are shared with the other guests but are seldom in use.
-About Our Cleaning Fee and Checkout instructions:
We take your vacation and our cleaning seriously—because it matters. Your cleaning fee covers far more than just a spotless space (which you’ll absolutely have). It also includes fresh linens, fully stocked coffee and snacks, bottled water, and the time it takes our team to prepare the home properly for every stay.
Most importantly: we never ask guests to clean before they leave. That’s exactly what the cleaning fee is for.
Our checkout instructions are intentionally simple:
• Let us know when you’re heading out (so we can get started for the next guest)
• Lock the door
That’s it. Relax, enjoy your stay, and leave the rest to us.

Checkout:
Checkout is 11am, but we can offer late checkout as availability allows. 12pm checkout is $20, and 1pm checkout is $30. Please contact us first and if we can accommodate your late checkout, we will be happy to.

listing_name: Sunset Villa • Walk to Park • 4 Miles to UNCW
description:
Welcome to Sunset Villa, your cozy Wilmington retreat! Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this home features a fully fenced backyard, parking for 3 cars, and all essentials for a worry-free, pack-light vacation provided by Posh Hospitality. Conveniently located 5 miles to Wrightsville Beach and downtown, 4 miles to UNCW, and 6 miles to ILM. Relax in comfort, explore top attractions, and enjoy nearby dining, shopping, and outdoor adventures. Book your stay and make lasting memories!

The space
Welcome to Sunset Villa, your cozy getaway in Kings Grant, a peaceful neighborhood in the heart of Wilmington. This charming home offers the perfect blend of comfort and convenience, featuring a fully fenced backyard and parking for up to three vehicles. Managed by Posh Hospitality, we provide everything you need for a worry-free, pack-light stay, including linens, towels, and thoughtfully stocked essentials.

Prime Location
Centrally located, Sunset Villa offers easy access to Wilmington’s top attractions. Wrightsville Beach is just 5 miles away, where you can enjoy soft sands, water sports, and stunning sunsets. Downtown Wilmington, also 5 miles away, invites you to explore the Riverwalk, dine at award-winning restaurants, and discover local shops and breweries. UNC Wilmington is only 4 miles away, making this an ideal home base for campus visits, family weekends, or events. Wilmington International Airport is approximately 6 miles away, providing convenient travel access.

🏠The Space
This thoughtfully furnished home is designed with comfort in mind. Guests can enjoy comfortable bedrooms with fresh linens and cozy bedding, inviting living areas perfect for movie nights or relaxing after a day of exploring, and a fully stocked kitchen equipped for everything from quick snacks to full meals. The fully fenced backyard offers a great outdoor space to unwind or let kids play safely. Dogs are welcome with a $100 pet fee per dog.

🛁All-Inclusive Amenities
At Posh Hospitality, we focus on making your stay as effortless as possible. From plush towels and fresh linens to a well-equipped kitchen and household essentials, everything is prepared for your arrival so you can truly pack light and enjoy your time away.

🏖️Explore the Area
Wilmington offers something for everyone. Enjoy outdoor adventures like paddleboarding at Wrightsville Beach, strolling through Airlie Gardens, or exploring Greenfield Lake Park. Families can spend the day at Jungle Rapids Family Fun Park or visit the North Carolina Aquarium at Independence Mall. Food lovers will appreciate Wilmington’s vibrant dining scene, from fresh seafood to local favorites downtown, and shopping options range from charming boutiques to popular destinations like Mayfaire Town Center.

Whether you’re visiting UNCW, planning a beach getaway, traveling with family, or simply looking for a quiet retreat close to it all, Sunset Villa is the perfect home base. Book your stay and start creating unforgettable Wilmington memories.

Guest access
You will be renting the entire home, with parking for up to 3 cars. There is a locked shed in the backyard you do not have access to.

Other things to note
Pet & Service Animal Policy

Well-behaved dogs are welcome with a $100 per dog fee. Paid pets may be left unattended only if they are fully house-trained, kept off furniture, or properly crated when alone.

Service animals are not permitted to be left unattended in the home at any time. A service animal must remain under the handler’s control at all times and may not be left alone in the property for any duration.

Any dog — including a service animal — found unattended in violation of this policy may result in immediate cancellation of the reservation without refund, along with additional cleaning or damage fees if applicable.

If you need to leave the home without your dog, we are happy to provide recommendations for local doggy daycares and professional pet sitters.

description:
This adorable 3 bedroom cottage offers all of the charm, comfort and convenience expected in a modern coastal home! Perfect for groups of any size from couples to families and pup friendly with a fully enclosed backyard. New furnishings, excellent bedding, charming design are the signature at Peachtree. Located in the heart of Wilmington’s “Midtown” you will have quick access to both our beautiful beaches and the Historic Riverfront. Located within a quaint residential neighborhood

The space
Welcome to our favorite midtown bungalow! Newly renovated, this house is set up to ensure a relaxing, fun and extremely comfortable visit. From the quaint rocking chair front porch, to the fully fenced backyard and patio you will enjoy an expertly stocked and styled home away from home. While not exploring some of the fantastic local restaurants you will find the kitchen fully outfitted for all cooking styles with a gas range, ample cookware and plenty of serveware. Caffeinating styles are also top priority with a Keurig, quality drip coffee maker and teapot supplied. New hybrid, memory foam bedding ensure quality rest, along with a private office area for working remotely.
The bungalow is equipped with new smart TV’s and high speed Spectrum internet.
Enjoy morning coffee or sunset cocktails under the patio lights year round in the private backyard! A propane grill, outdoor dining area and firepit offer the perfect setup for cool Carolina evenings or summer nights when fresh grilled seafood and s’mores are in season:)

description:
Come and enjoy all the simple pleasures that downtown has to offer without starting the car. Located in the center Wilmingtons most historic row of houses. Your Mansion district downtown condo is your relaxing getaway. Enjoy private access to this second floor condo with comfortable furnishings, a wonderful porch & park for free Downtown! (yay!). This unit is street facing and you may hear some street noise at night.

Enjoy:
Free off-s

The space
Situated right downtown in a beautiful historic row of mansions, you'll find this condo has old world charm paired with modern amenities. The vintage hardwood floors, baseboards, and other historic details will take you back in time to the 1800's, but the comfortable furniture, clean atmosphere, stocked kitchen, comfy bed, smart TV, and wifi meet today's traveler's needs. This condo is one of five in a large historic house on Front Street. Front Street is downtown and this unit is street facing so, if you're sensitive to some evening car noise, maybe choose one of our other units.

Guest access
Your condo is private with a private entrance, and is one of 5 is an amazing historic home. You can chill out on the shared porch or sit outside in the backyard on the patio. You’ll have access to a shared laundry room with coin operated machines inside. You'll also get one parking pass to park a normal size car or small pickup behind the house (free parking in downtown Wilmington!!)

Other things to note
Parking:
-Free parking behind the house: You have one (1) free parking spot! The alley entrance to the parking area is 9 feet wide. That means you cannot fit a large work van or a big work truck and trailers are not allowed.

-Free Parking on the Street: Everyone in Wilmington knows that street parking is a drag unless you know a local with a Historic District Parking Pass. Now you do. If your truck is too big, or you need more than one space we can get you a parking pass. Contact us, pay a $50.00 deposit (returned when the pass is returned) and you'll get a parking pass that you can use on any non metered space downtown and park free!!

Laundry:
There is an on site laundry facility. We try and keep soaps in there in case you need some. The machines and the laundry room are shared with the other guests but are seldom in use.
-About Our Cleaning Fee and Checkout instructions:
We take your vacation and our cleaning seriously—because it matters. Your cleaning fee covers far more than just a spotless space (which you’ll absolutely have). It also includes fresh linens, fully stocked coffee and snacks, bottled water, and the time it takes our team to prepare the home properly for every stay.
Most importantly: we never ask guests to clean before they leave. That’s exactly what the cleaning fee is for.
Our checkout instructions are intentionally simple:
• Let us know when you’re heading out (so we can get started for the next guest)
• Lock the door
That’s it. Relax, enjoy your stay, and leave the rest to us.
Checkout:
Checkout is 11am, but we can offer late checkout as availability allows. 12pm checkout is $20, and 1pm checkout is $30. Please contact us first and if we can accommodate your late checkout, we will be happy to.

Welcome to Brooklyn Arts District bungalow! This cozy retreat is just a short stroll from local breweries, restaurants, and art galleries, only a few blocks from Historic Downtown, and about 10 miles from Wrightsville Beach. We’re pet-friendly, so feel free to bring your furry companions along. Dogs are welcome for $25 per night, per dog, with the pet fee paid separately the morning of check-in. They’ll love the fenced-in backyard and the walkable, sidewalk-lined streets!

The space
Bladen Bungalow has undergone a refresh with an updated front porch boasting custom wooden posts & side privacy panels, upgraded lighting and comfortable seating. Inside you'll find new bedroom flooring, new bedding, furnishings and paint plus all the amenities to make yourself right at home. The bungalow is very clean, comfortable and has Wi-Fi throughout, a fully stocked kitchen and 2 bedrooms, each with a queen size bed. A full size washer & dryer are also available. The backyard is fenced in and boasts a fun fire pit area for guests to hang out & wind down. Well-behaved dogs are welcome for a nominal non-refundable pet fee. Please disclose your dog at time of reservation. The pet fee is $25 per dog, per night and is paid separately on the morning of check in.

Guest access
You will have access to the entire home including free off-street parking.

description:
Character | Charm | Comfort

Casa de Ventanas was thoughtfully restored with modern finishes throughout the entire space. This inviting home is located just 3 miles from Wrightsville Beach & 5 miles to Historic Downtown.

With 3,000sq, there is ample space to relax and unwind after a day of exploring. You will not find a more private backyard to enjoy morning coffee or an evening beverage.

Dog & Boat Friendly

The space
When you walk into Casa de Ventanas you'll be greeted with high ceilings and coastal décor from local artists. The first thing you'll see is an extra large marble island serving as the perfect location for morning coffee & making plans for the day.

The main hallway offers 3 bedrooms along the front of the home and half bath, full bath, and laundry room on the left side of the hallway. All bedrooms have privacy shades. At the end of the hallway is the oversize master bedroom with private bathroom and large custom glass shower. **All closets are locked - there are dressers in each room for clothes**

When you move past the sitting room, you’ll step down towards the living room looking at 12 oversized windows to the backyard and understand why we're called the house of windows.

INSIDE:

4 bedrooms
2.5 baths
6 beds (1 king, 3 queens, 2 singles, & pack n' play)
open kitchen
lounge couch and oversize bean bag chairs
custom glass shower w/waterfall head

OUTSIDE:

rocking chairs on front porch
800 square foot deck in backyard
6’ privacy fence encasing large backyard
outdoor dining table
outdoor furniture
solo stove fire pit
pergola
hammocks
raised garden bed

Other things to note
Our property is treated for mosquitos every 21 days - treatment generally works great but it’s not a guarantee!

listing_name: Cozy Home by Beaches & the Riverwalk- Dog-Friendly
description:
Conveniently located Cozy Home- Entire space to yourself! 🌴

This is a GREAT location because it is 3 min. from the main road, 10 min. from Carolina Beach, 15 min. from Kure Beach, 30 min. from Wrightsville Beach, 20 min. from Downtown, and 20 min. from ILM airport.

Designated Fenced Dog Area! Dogs are welcome! $100 Pet Cleaning Fee upon booking. Fenced in backyard, with specific fenced off dog area, and water bowl stand under the backyard tree. Hammock to lay on under the Crape Myrtle Trees.

The space
Happy Place Home is a three bed, two bath house. Fully furnished and dog friendly! Master Bedroom has king sized bed with a walk in closet with bathroom attached and the two other rooms will have single beds. Big Comfy couch in the living room! Living room has 50 inch Smart tv with fire stick and Master has a 40 inch Smart tv with Netflix and Amazon. The kitchen has coffee maker and juicer with essential cooking supplies and utensils. Plates, mason jar cups, coffee mugs, and wine glass.

Backyard with fire pit and propane grille. You will have to refill tank if empty. Two sides of gate you can access the backyard through. Right side is a double door if you have a bike, kayaks, or small fishing boat to store. For dog parents, the yard is separated by dog play area side and human chill side with a patio. Sun chairs outback and chairs around the fire pit. You will love this feature while enjoying the outdoors with your pup!

There are beautiful gardens and blueberry bushes in bloom June-July. There should be peaches come the fall. Garage will be locked for storage, but there is a two car wide driveway. House was redone the last two years and will be rented while we are away.

Guest access
Front yard, fenced in backyard with fenced in dog area, two gates (on both sides of the house), sunroom, and two patios.

Other things to note
Smoking Indoors Fine = $100 fine assessed at check out

Pet brought without being reported on the original reservation = $250 fine assessed at check in

Dog Poop Left Behind in backyard or front yard = $250 fine assessed at check out

If couch protectors are removed, there is a couch cleaning charge upon checkout, new couch

If you have more than 4 guests, please let me know in message and we can try to accommodate. There is a $75 per extra guest fee for over 4 people. Thank you for understanding!
