description:
Cape Fear River Condo cannot be beaten with its location! It's in the heart of downtown and a short walk to restaurants, bars, breweries, and shops. The best feature of the space is the beautiful view from the balcony! Enjoy your morning coffee on the rocking chairs or end the night with a glass of wine while enjoying a fantastic sunset. We are dog friendly, but need to approve your pet ahead of time. Let us know if you are planning to bring a dog, we allow up to 2 for a $75 pet fee per dog.

The space
Cape Fear River Condo cannot be beat with its location! It's a short walk to all restaurants, bars, breweries, and entertainment downtown Wilmington offers. The newly remodeled kitchen features black stainless steel appliances, quartz counters, and a marble backsplash. You'll be able to work from your laptop or enjoy a home cooked meal at the island table with barstool seating for up to 4. The kitchen is open to the living area that features entertainment options like an HD TV with Roku, a record player with various albums, board games, and an electric fireplace. The queen sleeper sofa allows the condo to sleep up to 4 guests.

The bedroom has an upholstered queen size bed, a spacious closet for storing your clothing, and extra sheets, pillows, and blankets to make your stay as comfortable as possible. The bathroom features tile flooring, a large vanity with a granite countertop, and some essentials to use during your stay.

The best feature of the space is the beautiful view from the balcony! Enjoy your morning coffee on the rocking chairs, or end the night with a glass of wine while enjoying a fantastic Cape Fear sunset.

We provide a parking pass for one car in a parking garage a few blocks away.

Guest access
Guests will have full access to the entire condo, a private balcony, and common space in the open atrium in the center of the building. There is a locked owners closet in the bathroom for our supplies, but everything else is yours to use. Guests can check in with a keypad entry. There is an elevator in the center of the courtyard for your convenience.

Other things to note
We do welcome up to 2 dogs during your stay as long as they are approved in advance. The $75 per pet fee will be charged separately after booking, so please message us directly.

Please be sure to review our cancellation policy prior to making your reservation. We strongly recommend purchasing trip insurance at the time of booking.

Thank you for booking with us!

listing_name: WoW! Private Pool Oasis.Close to beaches &downtown
description:
Wow! Beach or Pool? Why not both! Indulge in the ultimate vacation experience with our luxurious home in Wilmington, NC. Whether you want to soak up the sun at world-renowned Wrightsville Beach or lounge by your own private pool, this home is the perfect getaway for you.

The space
Recently remodeled, this spacious home boasts an open floor plan that is perfect for entertaining. The chef's kitchen is fully stocked with everything you need to prepare delicious meals, and the adjoining stainless steel dining table seats ten, with additional seating for five at the oversized island.

With four bedrooms and five beds, this home comfortably sleeps up to nine guests. There are two king master suites, one of which is located on the main floor, both featuring en suite bathrooms. The queen suite has a trundle bed with a slide-out twin bed, and the fourth suite has a queen bed.

The fireplace room is perfect for family game nights, featuring a professional-quality shuffleboard table, a game table, and a 30-foot blackboard. Grill up a feast on the large Traeger grill, or enjoy a margarita by the pool on one of the many loungers.

Whether you choose to spend your time in the backyard oasis or exploring the local area, you will feel the spaciousness and attention to detail throughout this home. The pool is open year-round, and there is even a large screened room to enjoy.

But it's not just the home itself that's impressive. Your home oasis is one of the most sought-after locations in Wilmington, and for good reason. Located just minutes from the airport and close to all the action. You'll have easy access to some of the most beautiful beaches in the world, with miles of pristine coastline to explore. Spend your days surfing, swimming, fishing, or simply walking along the sand and soaking up the sun. If you're feeling adventurous, you can try your hand at paddleboarding or kayaking.

With easy access to the beaches, university, downtown Riverwalk, and local spots, this home truly has it all. So why choose between the beach or the pool? Book your stay today and enjoy both at this spectacular luxury home in Wilmington, NC.

Guest access
The entire home, pool area and backyard are available. The garage is used for storage are is not included. there is plenty of parking.

Other things to note
It is a salt water pool. The pool is maintained professionally on a weekly basis. Our goal is for it to be available for guests. We do not anticipate any issues. However, be aware there is no guarantee that pool will be available due to nature of maintaining a pool. Thank you for understanding. The pool is not heated.
